programme.title: Night Coppers
programme.desc: Documentary that follows police officers while they deal with Brightons hectic night life. Phil scours the city for a suspect who has violently thrown a victim out of a vehicle, while Leanne races against time to find someone whos suicidal on a cliff edge. John joins a manhunt for suspects whove viciously attacked someone with a crowbar and left them in a life-threatening condition

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The crew of Warwickshire, Northamptonshire, Derbyshire, Leicestershire and Rutland Air Ambulance race to reach Anthony, whos in traumatic cardiac arrest after coming off his motorbike at high speed. In Buckingham, Thames Valley Air Ambulance look after Carol after shes been trampled by a foal and in Eccles-on-Sea, Carter needs the help of the East Anglian Air Ambulance service after coming off his jet ski. In Brundall, teenager Harry has an open leg fracture after walking in front of a car

programme.title: Dirty Business
programme.desc: Fact-based drama about pollution, criminal convictions and corporate wealth, exposing how Englands water companies have polluted natural resources for so long. It follows the story of retired detective Ash Smith and Oxford professor Peter Hammond who, when they notice the water in their local river has turned brown, begin to ask questions, leading to the start of a 10-year investigation. Starring David Thewlis and Jason Watkins

programme.title: Dirty Business
programme.desc: Continuing the fact-based drama about retired detective Ash Smith and Oxford professor Peter Hammond and their 10-year investigation into the sewage scandal. The drama also follows the Preen family, who went in search of answers after their eight-year-old daughter died after playing on a beach where a nearby pipe had been discharging. Starring David Thewlis, Jason Watkins, Posy Sterling and Tom McKay

programme.title: Dirty Business
programme.desc: Fact-based drama about a retired detective and an Oxford professor and their investigation into the sewage scandal. The story also follows surfer Reuben, who believes his chronic illness, Menieres disease, is a result of surfing in polluted water. Starring David Thewlis, Jason Watkins, Posy Sterling and Tom McKay

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It: Brilliant Builds
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer look back at a loft conversion in Walthamstow, east London, for the Clayton-Fisher family, who wanted to transform their dark and dingy attic. Sarah and her wife Pepper were struggling for space in their two-bed terrace and with plans to start a family on hold, Sarah thought it was time to move on, but Pepper dug her heels in and wanted to convert the loft

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien restores an old bluegrass banjo with the help of professional luthier Gary

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Gemma is determined to uncover the truth behind her dads behaviour and Rex is forced to hide as he continues to explore his identity. A newly released resident returns to seek revenge and, on the day of the joint engagement party, secrets threaten to spill, while Rex continues to struggle with the truth hes hiding. Gemma faces a painful revelation and Sienna makes a shock discovery. Mercedes returns from rehab with a shocking proposal. Sienna and Myra fight to keep baby Joseph in the village and Ste eagerly plans a holiday with Rex, in the hope of getting to know his future husband better

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Neil Delamere in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against words and numbers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: The Norm Who Came in from the Cold
programme.desc: Norm injures his back while painting the Cranes house and moves in until he recuperates. Meanwhile, Rebecca practices her mothering skills on an egg. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Woody Harrelson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Cliffs girlfriend instantly hits it off with his mother, and Rebecca recommends chilled underwear to aid Sams fertility. Comedy, starring John Ratzenberger, Frances Sternhagen and Margaret OKeefe

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebecca and Sam argue over what last name their child should have, but a stint looking after Carlas kids makes them wonder if they have the stamina to be parents. Comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert is ecstatic when he is recommended for a job with the FBI, until it starts to look like Maries intrusive ways may scupper his chances

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Debra amuse the guests at a party by doing a wickedly accurate impression of Frank and Marie - who are not amused and respond in kind with an impersonation of their own

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra finds a cassette that contains a message from Rays college girlfriend, and wants to know why he has saved it for all these years. She also shows Ray some of her keepsakes from previous relationships, prompting a severe case of jealousy on his part

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frederick visits Seattle and asks Frasier to take part in the radio station softball game, leaving him with only two days to learn to play the sport. Meanwhile, Niles becomes jealous of his nephew, who has developed a crush on Daphne

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz auditions for a position as the host of a radio show. After Frasier mentions to his agent Bebe that he would be sad to see his producer go, she tells the station manager that the psychiatrist will quit if Roz is hired. Comedy, guest starring Harriet Sansom Harris

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: To mark KACLs 50th anniversary, Frasier decides to recreate the stations first mystery theatre broadcast, but his over-directing of the actors turns the live show into a complete disaster - just as Niles predicted. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Three Dates and a Break-Up - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Martin and Sherry consider ending their relationship, while Frasier scores a notable success on the romantic front, dating three women in one weekend. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, John Mahoney and Marsha Mason

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Frank Fritz and Mike Wolfe stumble on a mountain of motorbikes. However, as they soon discover, getting to them is going to be far from easy

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head off to Huddersfield, West Yorkshire, to rescue a 1992 VW Corrado, a German coupe that, in its time, was one of the fastest small family cars on the road. The car belongs to 37-year-old Ashley, who even went as far as changing his surname to match his car. Sadly, when Ashley fell ill, his car ended up rotting away under a cover

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien and Max McMurdo head for Crewe to meet rock n roller Billy, who lives in a house that is frozen in time in the 1950s

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with comedian Neil Delamere joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Nanny Sarah and financial advisor Ian met on holiday in Spain and now want to buy a holiday home in south-east Lanzarote for them and all their family to enjoy. Jean Johansson shows them five properties for their budget of £90,000

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Restaurateurs Andrew and Richard go on a publicity push in France and on the Costa Blanca, Abi and Darren are hit by technical issues at their boogie wonderland. Glasgow couple Gordon and Shona finally take the reins of a diving business in Marbella

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Carl and Liz invite their fellow BandBers to their Cambridgeshire coaching inn, the Red House. The converted stable bedrooms leave the guests with positive first impressions - until one pair give their drawers a good dusting down

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the second evening in south Wales, account executive Richard invites his guests to the pub he runs with his partner. Things look promising as he serves up goats cheese tartlets, sea bass fillets and ginger biscuit cheesecake, while the pub setting proves a smash. But a revelation from Sophie and Claire hits a sour note with Sandra

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander heads to the beautiful island of Ibiza hoping to help Antonia and Ross find their dream holiday home there. The couple know the island very well having holidayed there many times. Lucy lines up five impressive options, but will any of them be right for Antonia and Ross?

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Battle of the Brands
programme.sub-title: Nandos vs KFC: Battle of the Brands
programme.desc: Documentary pitting two similar companies against one another each week, beginning with arguably the two most popular chicken restaurants in the UK. Kate Quilton goes behind the counter to find out how American fried chicken colossus KFC and peri-peri powerhouse Nandos built billion-pound empires and continue to cash in on the UKs love of chicken

programme.title: Handcuffed: Last Pair Standing
programme.desc: The unlikely manacled couples are still living cheek by jowl as they get to know each other - for better or for worse. Housewife and self-confessed prude Charlie hopes being handcuffed to a total stranger will help broaden her mind. After her initial shock at being chained to 6ft 7 heavily tattooed Rob, they settle into domestic bliss at Charlies cottage. Meanwhile, the forced friendship between Christian hairdresser Nina and chatty mum of seven Sara could be the start of something beautiful - until the former realises just how talkative her partner is

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics views on Britains Got Talent, The Heat, 56 Days, Olivia Attwood: Getting Filthy Rich, Ed Staffords Rite Of Passage, Alice Roberts: Our Hospital Through Time, BBC News (Andrew Arrested) and ITV News (Mandelson Arrested)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including Coronation Street, The Sky at Night, The Stolen Girl and The Piano. They also share opionons on Mickey Rourke on Celebrity Big Brother, savoury cocktails on Saturday Kitchen, the Katy Perrys journey into space

programme.title: Millionaire Hoarders
programme.desc: Retired artists Carole and Roger have filled every room of their nine-bed Georgian home with unusual objects theyve collected from around the world. Their country pile is in urgent need of repair; and with little income coming in, they call on the experts to help sift through the items to potentially unearth prized items that could raise life-changing sums of cash. Plus, high-end pawnbroker Rachel investigates a huge collection of jewellery owned by former lawyer Emma, who gave up her high-flying job to follow her dream of starting a jewellery business and needs extra money to stay afloat

programme.title: Secret Genius
programme.desc: Alan Carr and Susie Dent host the grand final. The four remaining contestants must place famous geniuses correctly on a giant board, before two are chosen to face the final challenge - a nail-biting second round of fluid reasoning and memory games

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay strives to turn around the fortunes of Puerto Rican restaurant El Cantito. The establishment, located in Yonkers, New York, has struggled to stay afloat post-Covid amidst the breakage of key appliances, staff problems and such unfortunate instances as uncooked chicken being served. Can Gordon turn things around?

programme.title: The Last Leg
programme.desc: Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker are joined by comedians Jason Manford, Lou Sanders, Bella Hull and Zack Polanski for a comic review of the significant moments of the past seven days. As usual, the hashtag #isitok paves the way for the gang to round up, examine and explain the leading and most entertaining news stories of the week

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Highlights from the food and chat show, hosted by Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer

programme.title: Our Welsh Chapel Dream
programme.desc: Keith Brymer Jones and his partner Marj restore a 160-year-old derelict chapel in Pwllheli, on Wales Llyn Peninsula, to turn it into a forever home with a working pottery studio for the community. In this first episode, Keith and Marj discover the local pigeons have moved in

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer revisit their oldest-ever house-hunters, Margot and Henry from Berkshire, who were looking to move to somewhere a little more modern after 50 years in the same place. They also catch up with young couple Wendy and Simon, who were desperate to find their first home in Derby

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with comedian Neil Delamere joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: Bar Wars V - The Final Judgement
programme.desc: Rival bar-owner Gary backs out of the annual Halloween prank-playing due to ill health, but Sam doesnt believe he is genuinely poorly - with dire consequences. Elsewhere, stuck-up parents Frasier and Lilith dress up to take their son trick-or-treating

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: Where Have All the Floorboards Gone?
programme.desc: Its Norms birthday, so as a surprise, Sam arranges for Boston Celtics basketball player Kevin McHale to drop in and present him with a team jacket. However, when the star gets dragged into a pointless discussion, it obsesses him for weeks to come - and completely destroys his ability on the court. Bar-room comedy, starring Ted Danson and George Wendt

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam asks Carla to help him exact revenge on John Allen Hill, the irritating owner of the seafood restaurant above Cheers, but she ends up falling for him instead. Meanwhile, Cliff faces a new challenge at work _ riding a horse. Comedy, guest starring Keene Curtis, with Ted Danson and Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray steels himself for the delicate matter of telling Ally where babies come from - only to learn she is more interested in discussing the meaning of life itself. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra runs for school president, but Ray decides to vote against her to avoid looking after the twins during all the meetings she would have to attend. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra tries to create a sense of affection and familiarity by addressing Marie as mom - but the gesture backfires badly and offends her real mother, who finds it inappropriate

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Three Dates and a Break-Up - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. The Crane brothers congratulate themselves on getting rid of Sherry - but like the proverbial bad penny, she soon turns up again, determined not to let Martin go without a fight. Kelsey Grammer stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne falls out with Sherry and flees the apartment after the two have a blazing row. With nowhere else to go, she asks if she can spend the night at Niless flat, leaving him quaking with excitement. Comedy, starring David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles receives divorce papers from Maris - and to show he is not as spineless as people think, he signs them immediately. Later, though, he begins to regret his impulsiveness. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: After Niles asks him whether he should stay with Maris, Frasier wanders the streets in film-noir fashion to find an answer for his long-suffering brother. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike Wolfe and the team face more challenges in the form of two vintage Harley-Davidson motorcycles they would like to buy in Pennsylvania

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head to Rochdale to rescue an Opel Manta GTE. The car belongs to former amateur rally driver Alan, who loved his Manta so much he couldnt bear to part with it, even when it went off the road. With Alan becoming a bit of a recluse after developing health problems and losing his wife to cancer, his family and friends hope that the Car S.O.S treatment will be just the thing to bring Alan back out of his shell

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Maidenhead, Berkshire, Simon OBrien falls in love with an old ships carpenters chest, while Henry Cole takes away a miniature tether car, which he hopes to get moving again

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with comedian Neil Delamere joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Train driver Wayne and train manager Kate from Staffordshire met at work 21 years ago and its been full steam ahead ever since. Property expert Lee Juggurnauth shows them the best places their £85,000 budget can secure in the village of Pinar de Campoverde in south-east Spain

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In France, new plans and schemes keep restaurateurs Andrew and Richard on their toes and there are costly complications at Gordon and Shonas dive centre in Marbella. Best friends Janey and Sharon swap life in Blighty for a French adventure in Corrèze

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals stay the night at Barbara and Elizabeths Holly Lodge Boutique BandB in Norfolk. Grout doubts in the bathroom get things off to a bad start but the hosts dance into the good books with an afternoon soundtracked by an old Wurlitzer organ

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hotel receptionist Daffyd hosts a nutritious dinner party on the third night in south Wales. After a few kitchen mishaps during the day, the night gets off to a competitive start with Sandra challenging the host - an aspiring personal trainer - to a press-up competition

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Craig Rowe helps keen dancers Jane and James search for their dream holiday home on eastern Crete: a holidaymakers paradise full of stunning beaches with crystal-clear waters, archaeological sites and picturesque villages and towns. For their budget of £130,000 Craig lines up five fabulous options, from traditional Cretan houses packed full of charm and a villa with wrap-around views, to a beautiful bungalow with bags of potential

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil help Sue and Richard from Mapperley decide whether to sell or renovate their home. After Richard suffered a stroke two years ago he struggles to get around the two-storey house and thinks one-level living would be much easier for them, but Sue loves their home and thinks with a complete re-jig of the ground floor they could make it fit their needs. While Kirstie conjures up a plan to make their home more accessible, Phil sets out to find a one-floor home for them with some gorgeous views

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.sub-title: The Butcher of Suburbia - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. The inside story of the murder of a 74-year-old woman, and the macabre lengths the killer went to in attempting to conceal her death. Annette Smiths lodger reported that she has been missing for several weeks. Missing Persons find no trace of her. Detectives from the Major Crime Unit are called in on a gripping and disturbing case that shocks detectives

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.sub-title: The Butcher of Suburbia - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. Detectives from the Major Crime Unit at Bedfordshire Police have a suspect in custody who admits to the crime - but the confession is only the beginning of a case that will bring a series of deeply disturbing twists and turns in a tale that shocks and surprises the experienced police team. Cameras follow as the police continue to probe the suspect and the interview becomes more and more chilling

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Andrew is rushed to Queens Medical Centre after sustaining a severe facial injury from a machine at work. Trainee advanced clinical practitioner Emily Rowe oversees the 40-year-olds challenging treatment. In Resus, doctors need to work out the cause of 61-year-old Johns sudden blackouts, which are causing him to fall over, including falling down the stairs. Tony has come to AandE after being crushed by a forklift truck which trapped his ankle and cut his head

programme.title: Super Surgeons: A Chance at Life
programme.desc: Fifty-three-year-old ex-Naval Pilot Rich is suffering from a 16cm tumour that stretches from his jawline down to his heart, wrapping around his carotid artery. Consultant Head and Neck Surgeon Professor Vin Paleri requires close collaboration with vascular and cardiac specialists to delicately remove the tumour, potentially sacrificing the major artery in the process

programme.title: The Dunblane Tapes
programme.desc: The story of the grassroots campaign to ban private handguns in Britain through the recently uncovered recordings of a bereaved parent after the Dunblane school shooting in 1996. After the event, three mothers who were outraged that the perpetrator could legally carry four handguns and over 1,000 rounds of ammunition, launched a nationwide campaign to lobby the government to ban the private use of handguns in Britain, gaining support from the bereaved parents of Dunblane including John Crozier, who documented the most successful grassroots campaign in British history

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay steps in to assess a troubled Brooklyn restaurant thats sinking into debt. As an additional problem, its co-owners are constantly clashing. Can the acerbic chef help sort out the finances and operations before it folds?

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: American comedian and actress Desiree Burch joins Joe Lycett for some snow-filled shenanigans in the city of Rovaniemi - the official home of Santa Claus - in Finnish Lapland on the edge of the Arctic Circle. The pair try out ice floating by donning rubber suits and climbing into a freezing lake. After they thaw out, they head for a five-course tasting menu inspired by Lappish ingredients including reindeer. On day two, Joe and Desiree experience ice fishing, ride in a traditional Sami reindeer caravan, learn some local handicrafts and look for the Northern lights

programme.title: Our Welsh Chapel Dream
programme.desc: Keith and Marj submit their application to transform the chapel into a home, pottery studio and events space. While they anxiously wait for the news, they turn their attentions to ripping out rot, learning some Welsh and opening the chapel to pitch their audacious plan to the local community

programme.title: Kirsties House of Craft
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp transforms fabric by dyeing it with turmeric, and embellishes an old lampshade

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer and Kirstie Allsopp catch up with Amy and Takie, who were desperate to buy their first property in London, but had to put their dream on hold until they could save enough to make buying worthwhile. There is also an update on Vicky and Andy, who combined their search for a home and two businesses in Wiltshire on a budget of £400,000 - an idea they eventually reconsidered when the reality of the market became clear

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with comedian Neil Delamere joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Woody has trouble proposing to Kelly, especially as Henri has already tricked her into saying she will marry him, claiming he is about to be deported. American bar-room comedy, starring Woody Harrelson and Jackie Swanson

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The crew of Warwickshire, Northamptonshire, Derbyshire, Leicestershire and Rutland Air Ambulance race to reach Anthony, whos in traumatic cardiac arrest after coming off his motorbike at high speed. In Buckingham, Thames Valley Air Ambulance look after Carol after shes been trampled by a foal and in Eccles-on-Sea, Carter needs the help of the East Anglian Air Ambulance service after coming off his jet ski. In Brundall, teenager Harry has an open leg fracture after walking in front of a car

programme.title: Dirty Business
programme.desc: Fact-based drama about pollution, criminal convictions and corporate wealth, exposing how Englands water companies have polluted natural resources for so long. It follows the story of retired detective Ash Smith and Oxford professor Peter Hammond who, when they notice the water in their local river has turned brown, begin to ask questions, leading to the start of a 10-year investigation. Starring David Thewlis and Jason Watkins

programme.title: Dirty Business
programme.desc: Continuing the fact-based drama about retired detective Ash Smith and Oxford professor Peter Hammond and their 10-year investigation into the sewage scandal. The drama also follows the Preen family, who went in search of answers after their eight-year-old daughter died after playing on a beach where a nearby pipe had been discharging. Starring David Thewlis, Jason Watkins, Posy Sterling and Tom McKay

programme.title: Dirty Business
programme.desc: Fact-based drama about a retired detective and an Oxford professor and their investigation into the sewage scandal. The story also follows surfer Reuben, who believes his chronic illness, Menieres disease, is a result of surfing in polluted water. Starring David Thewlis, Jason Watkins, Posy Sterling and Tom McKay

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It: Brilliant Builds
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer look back at a loft conversion in Walthamstow, east London, for the Clayton-Fisher family, who wanted to transform their dark and dingy attic. Sarah and her wife Pepper were struggling for space in their two-bed terrace and with plans to start a family on hold, Sarah thought it was time to move on, but Pepper dug her heels in and wanted to convert the loft

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien restores an old bluegrass banjo with the help of professional luthier Gary

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Gemma is determined to uncover the truth behind her dads behaviour and Rex is forced to hide as he continues to explore his identity. A newly released resident returns to seek revenge and, on the day of the joint engagement party, secrets threaten to spill, while Rex continues to struggle with the truth hes hiding. Gemma faces a painful revelation and Sienna makes a shock discovery. Mercedes returns from rehab with a shocking proposal. Sienna and Myra fight to keep baby Joseph in the village and Ste eagerly plans a holiday with Rex, in the hope of getting to know his future husband better

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Neil Delamere in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against words and numbers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: The Norm Who Came in from the Cold
programme.desc: Norm injures his back while painting the Cranes house and moves in until he recuperates. Meanwhile, Rebecca practices her mothering skills on an egg. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Woody Harrelson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Cliffs girlfriend instantly hits it off with his mother, and Rebecca recommends chilled underwear to aid Sams fertility. Comedy, starring John Ratzenberger, Frances Sternhagen and Margaret OKeefe

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebecca and Sam argue over what last name their child should have, but a stint looking after Carlas kids makes them wonder if they have the stamina to be parents. Comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert is ecstatic when he is recommended for a job with the FBI, until it starts to look like Maries intrusive ways may scupper his chances

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Debra amuse the guests at a party by doing a wickedly accurate impression of Frank and Marie - who are not amused and respond in kind with an impersonation of their own

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra finds a cassette that contains a message from Rays college girlfriend, and wants to know why he has saved it for all these years. She also shows Ray some of her keepsakes from previous relationships, prompting a severe case of jealousy on his part

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frederick visits Seattle and asks Frasier to take part in the radio station softball game, leaving him with only two days to learn to play the sport. Meanwhile, Niles becomes jealous of his nephew, who has developed a crush on Daphne

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz auditions for a position as the host of a radio show. After Frasier mentions to his agent Bebe that he would be sad to see his producer go, she tells the station manager that the psychiatrist will quit if Roz is hired. Comedy, guest starring Harriet Sansom Harris

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: To mark KACLs 50th anniversary, Frasier decides to recreate the stations first mystery theatre broadcast, but his over-directing of the actors turns the live show into a complete disaster - just as Niles predicted. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Three Dates and a Break-Up - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Martin and Sherry consider ending their relationship, while Frasier scores a notable success on the romantic front, dating three women in one weekend. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, John Mahoney and Marsha Mason

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Frank Fritz and Mike Wolfe stumble on a mountain of motorbikes. However, as they soon discover, getting to them is going to be far from easy

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head off to Huddersfield, West Yorkshire, to rescue a 1992 VW Corrado, a German coupe that, in its time, was one of the fastest small family cars on the road. The car belongs to 37-year-old Ashley, who even went as far as changing his surname to match his car. Sadly, when Ashley fell ill, his car ended up rotting away under a cover

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien and Max McMurdo head for Crewe to meet rock n roller Billy, who lives in a house that is frozen in time in the 1950s

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with comedian Neil Delamere joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Nanny Sarah and financial advisor Ian met on holiday in Spain and now want to buy a holiday home in south-east Lanzarote for them and all their family to enjoy. Jean Johansson shows them five properties for their budget of £90,000

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Restaurateurs Andrew and Richard go on a publicity push in France and on the Costa Blanca, Abi and Darren are hit by technical issues at their boogie wonderland. Glasgow couple Gordon and Shona finally take the reins of a diving business in Marbella

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Carl and Liz invite their fellow BandBers to their Cambridgeshire coaching inn, the Red House. The converted stable bedrooms leave the guests with positive first impressions - until one pair give their drawers a good dusting down

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the second evening in south Wales, account executive Richard invites his guests to the pub he runs with his partner. Things look promising as he serves up goats cheese tartlets, sea bass fillets and ginger biscuit cheesecake, while the pub setting proves a smash. But a revelation from Sophie and Claire hits a sour note with Sandra

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander heads to the beautiful island of Ibiza hoping to help Antonia and Ross find their dream holiday home there. The couple know the island very well having holidayed there many times. Lucy lines up five impressive options, but will any of them be right for Antonia and Ross?

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Battle of the Brands
programme.sub-title: Nandos vs KFC: Battle of the Brands
programme.desc: Documentary pitting two similar companies against one another each week, beginning with arguably the two most popular chicken restaurants in the UK. Kate Quilton goes behind the counter to find out how American fried chicken colossus KFC and peri-peri powerhouse Nandos built billion-pound empires and continue to cash in on the UKs love of chicken

programme.title: Handcuffed: Last Pair Standing
programme.desc: The unlikely manacled couples are still living cheek by jowl as they get to know each other - for better or for worse. Housewife and self-confessed prude Charlie hopes being handcuffed to a total stranger will help broaden her mind. After her initial shock at being chained to 6ft 7 heavily tattooed Rob, they settle into domestic bliss at Charlies cottage. Meanwhile, the forced friendship between Christian hairdresser Nina and chatty mum of seven Sara could be the start of something beautiful - until the former realises just how talkative her partner is

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics views on Britains Got Talent, The Heat, 56 Days, Olivia Attwood: Getting Filthy Rich, Ed Staffords Rite Of Passage, Alice Roberts: Our Hospital Through Time, BBC News (Andrew Arrested) and ITV News (Mandelson Arrested)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including Coronation Street, The Sky at Night, The Stolen Girl and The Piano. They also share opionons on Mickey Rourke on Celebrity Big Brother, savoury cocktails on Saturday Kitchen, the Katy Perrys journey into space

programme.title: Millionaire Hoarders
programme.desc: Retired artists Carole and Roger have filled every room of their nine-bed Georgian home with unusual objects theyve collected from around the world. Their country pile is in urgent need of repair; and with little income coming in, they call on the experts to help sift through the items to potentially unearth prized items that could raise life-changing sums of cash. Plus, high-end pawnbroker Rachel investigates a huge collection of jewellery owned by former lawyer Emma, who gave up her high-flying job to follow her dream of starting a jewellery business and needs extra money to stay afloat

programme.title: Secret Genius
programme.desc: Alan Carr and Susie Dent host the grand final. The four remaining contestants must place famous geniuses correctly on a giant board, before two are chosen to face the final challenge - a nail-biting second round of fluid reasoning and memory games

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay strives to turn around the fortunes of Puerto Rican restaurant El Cantito. The establishment, located in Yonkers, New York, has struggled to stay afloat post-Covid amidst the breakage of key appliances, staff problems and such unfortunate instances as uncooked chicken being served. Can Gordon turn things around?

programme.title: The Last Leg
programme.desc: Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker are joined by comedians Jason Manford, Lou Sanders, Bella Hull and Zack Polanski for a comic review of the significant moments of the past seven days. As usual, the hashtag #isitok paves the way for the gang to round up, examine and explain the leading and most entertaining news stories of the week

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Highlights from the food and chat show, hosted by Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer

programme.title: Our Welsh Chapel Dream
programme.desc: Keith Brymer Jones and his partner Marj restore a 160-year-old derelict chapel in Pwllheli, on Wales Llyn Peninsula, to turn it into a forever home with a working pottery studio for the community. In this first episode, Keith and Marj discover the local pigeons have moved in

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer revisit their oldest-ever house-hunters, Margot and Henry from Berkshire, who were looking to move to somewhere a little more modern after 50 years in the same place. They also catch up with young couple Wendy and Simon, who were desperate to find their first home in Derby

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with comedian Neil Delamere joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: Bar Wars V - The Final Judgement
programme.desc: Rival bar-owner Gary backs out of the annual Halloween prank-playing due to ill health, but Sam doesnt believe he is genuinely poorly - with dire consequences. Elsewhere, stuck-up parents Frasier and Lilith dress up to take their son trick-or-treating

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: Where Have All the Floorboards Gone?
programme.desc: Its Norms birthday, so as a surprise, Sam arranges for Boston Celtics basketball player Kevin McHale to drop in and present him with a team jacket. However, when the star gets dragged into a pointless discussion, it obsesses him for weeks to come - and completely destroys his ability on the court. Bar-room comedy, starring Ted Danson and George Wendt

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam asks Carla to help him exact revenge on John Allen Hill, the irritating owner of the seafood restaurant above Cheers, but she ends up falling for him instead. Meanwhile, Cliff faces a new challenge at work _ riding a horse. Comedy, guest starring Keene Curtis, with Ted Danson and Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray steels himself for the delicate matter of telling Ally where babies come from - only to learn she is more interested in discussing the meaning of life itself. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra runs for school president, but Ray decides to vote against her to avoid looking after the twins during all the meetings she would have to attend. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra tries to create a sense of affection and familiarity by addressing Marie as mom - but the gesture backfires badly and offends her real mother, who finds it inappropriate

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Three Dates and a Break-Up - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. The Crane brothers congratulate themselves on getting rid of Sherry - but like the proverbial bad penny, she soon turns up again, determined not to let Martin go without a fight. Kelsey Grammer stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne falls out with Sherry and flees the apartment after the two have a blazing row. With nowhere else to go, she asks if she can spend the night at Niless flat, leaving him quaking with excitement. Comedy, starring David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles receives divorce papers from Maris - and to show he is not as spineless as people think, he signs them immediately. Later, though, he begins to regret his impulsiveness. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: After Niles asks him whether he should stay with Maris, Frasier wanders the streets in film-noir fashion to find an answer for his long-suffering brother. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike Wolfe and the team face more challenges in the form of two vintage Harley-Davidson motorcycles they would like to buy in Pennsylvania

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head to Rochdale to rescue an Opel Manta GTE. The car belongs to former amateur rally driver Alan, who loved his Manta so much he couldnt bear to part with it, even when it went off the road. With Alan becoming a bit of a recluse after developing health problems and losing his wife to cancer, his family and friends hope that the Car S.O.S treatment will be just the thing to bring Alan back out of his shell

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Maidenhead, Berkshire, Simon OBrien falls in love with an old ships carpenters chest, while Henry Cole takes away a miniature tether car, which he hopes to get moving again

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with comedian Neil Delamere joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Train driver Wayne and train manager Kate from Staffordshire met at work 21 years ago and its been full steam ahead ever since. Property expert Lee Juggurnauth shows them the best places their £85,000 budget can secure in the village of Pinar de Campoverde in south-east Spain

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In France, new plans and schemes keep restaurateurs Andrew and Richard on their toes and there are costly complications at Gordon and Shonas dive centre in Marbella. Best friends Janey and Sharon swap life in Blighty for a French adventure in Corrèze

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals stay the night at Barbara and Elizabeths Holly Lodge Boutique BandB in Norfolk. Grout doubts in the bathroom get things off to a bad start but the hosts dance into the good books with an afternoon soundtracked by an old Wurlitzer organ

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hotel receptionist Daffyd hosts a nutritious dinner party on the third night in south Wales. After a few kitchen mishaps during the day, the night gets off to a competitive start with Sandra challenging the host - an aspiring personal trainer - to a press-up competition

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Craig Rowe helps keen dancers Jane and James search for their dream holiday home on eastern Crete: a holidaymakers paradise full of stunning beaches with crystal-clear waters, archaeological sites and picturesque villages and towns. programme.desc: Butters becomes convinced he has seen a vampire at school, but cannot get anyone to believe him - and starts to think he would be better off joining the ranks of the undead

programme.title: Friends

programme.sub-title: The One with the Ultimate Fighting Champion

programme.desc: A burglary on the set of a TV detective show distracts Peralta and Diaz from the precincts on-going evaluation. As the rest of the squad concentrate on the task in hand and a new auditor takes over, Peralta finds himself charmed by the glamour of showbusiness

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam worries about being hazed by the older students when he goes to high school, but he soon earns their respect by body-slamming Barry. Erica and her friends talk about what they are going to put into their school-time capsule

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam works on a new persona that he hopes will make him seem cool on his first day at high school. But after Murray pays a visit to the school, everyone learns an important lesson. Tim Meadows and Allie Grant guest star

programme.title: Hollyoaks

programme.desc: Vicky is still on edge after recent events, Sienna makes a tough decision, and a resident is faced with the truth

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits PJs Steakhouse in Queens, New York, to provide his expert advice to the owners. They decided to turn a successful bar into a high-end restaurant, but without any previous experience in managing a business they found themselves seriously in debt. With an over-confident chef and a partner propping up the bar, co-owner Madalyn faces a few difficult decisions

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Florida to help the owners of Fleming, a Danish restaurant in Miami. A husband-and-wife duo bought the business eight years ago in the hope of continuing the places success, but started losing money rapidly. With a Cuban chef cooking Nordic cuisine and a filthy kitchen, things go from bad to worse until it all comes to a head on relaunch night

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam tries to start a Mel Brooks club after he sees the movie Spaceballs, but Jackie mistakes his club advertisement for political satire and puts it in the school paper. programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cameron and Mitchell learn that Lilly has started her periods, so they call in reinforcements to give her advice. Phil tells Luke he recently attended a prenatal class with Haley

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch, Cam and Phil crash Jays annual hiking trip to find an elusive eagle after Gloria asks them to keep an eye on him, while Alex, Claire and Haley plan a baby shower

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Sushi Ko, a Japanese restaurant in California that is losing up to $20,000 a month. Gordon finds owner and chef Akira lacking in confidence and self-esteem as the strain of an empty business is beginning to take its toll on his relationship with this family

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits California, where his job is to help the owner of Lido Di Manhattan. Lisa Marie Hemmat, an ambitious business school graduate, has been running the restaurant for the past five years, but has failed to exert any control over the kitchen and the menu. The chef tries to teach her the basics of cooking and venue management, but trouble brews when her staff threaten to walk out on relaunch night

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: On Halloween, the squad members follow precinct tradition and pull out all the stops as they compete for the title of Ultimate Detective Slash Genius in the Halloween Heist. Peralta, Santiago and Holt are the determined competitors - but who will be crowned the reigning champion?

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Pimento and Diaz decide to tie the knot, the squad members try to prepare the perfect wedding under Santiagos careful direction. Peralta and Gina help Pimento to find his grandmothers ruby earrings so that Diaz can wear them at the ceremony. Jason Mantzoukas guest stars

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Krusty learns he has a long-lost daughter, but ruins any chances of a happy family life by gambling away her most prized possession in a high-stakes poker game. Featuring the guest voices of Drew Barrymore, John Updike, Amy Tam and Stephen King

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa joins an environmental protection group and begins campaigning in a last-ditch attempt to prevent the citys oldest redwood tree being felled by a rich Texan. With the voice of Joshua Jackson

programme.sub-title: The Living Room: A 100 Per Cent True Story

Meanwhile, Beverly is horrified to learn that Erica and Adam dont want any of the priceless heirlooms in her fancy, never-really-used living room

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch and Cam help Lily overcome her insecurities about wearing a bathing suit to a pool party, but discover they have some of their own. Meanwhile, now that Glorias new internship is taking up so much of her time, Jay is feeling particularly neglected

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits California, where his job is to help the owner of Lido Di Manhattan. Lisa Marie Hemmat, an ambitious business school graduate, has been running the restaurant for the past five years, but has failed to exert any control over the kitchen and the menu. The chef tries to teach her the basics of cooking and venue management, but trouble brews when her staff threaten to walk out on relaunch night

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Lainey moves back to town and Barry invites her to the prom, but when she refuses, he plans a prank with Principal Balls car to get out of going. Erica tells Murray she has made a final decision about her future at college, but he is so furious that he insists she pay her own way for rent and food

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As Adam celebrates his 16th birthday, his parents are too distracted by Barry and Laineys engagement and Ericas band ambitions to acknowledge their youngest sons big day. However, the situation presents an opportunity for Adam to ask Erica to put him on the high school social map. Meanwhile, Beverly thinks she can scare Barry and Lainey straight with the reality of being adults

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil feels emasculated when Bill wows Dylan and Luke with heroic tales. He gets them over for some male bonding, but it goes rather wrong

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claires newfound positivity leads her to inadvertently approve of Lukes new relationship with someone from work, while Phil gets a shock when he surprises Alex at school

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Boca Raton in Florida to turn around the fortunes of Italian restaurant Anna Vincenzos. The owner opened the establishment in 2001 with the help of her father but the business has failed to meet her expectations, and the chef realises that her ruthless style of management is having an adverse influence, not only on her staff but also on her family

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Newbury Park in southern California to help Mexican restaurant Mama Ritas. The owner previously ran a successful catering company but has struggled to adapt her skills to meet the demands of a new business - and with a years worth of food stored in the freezer Gordon realises he has a tough job ahead

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta goes to extremes trying to impress Santiagos father at Thanksgiving dinner. Boyle is on turkey duty, and Holt helps Pimento deal with no longer being able to work for the NYPD

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When a famous author receives death threats, Peralta and Jeffords take the case so that Jeffords can meet his lifelong hero. Gina wants to choose the location of the annual Boyle family vacation, and Santiago gets in the middle of a fight between Captain Holt and Kevin

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Homer and Lisa Exchange Cross Words
programme.desc: Lisa learns she is good at crossword puzzles and enters a city-wide contest. Homer opens a break-up service after discovering he has a flair for letting loved ones down, but gets himself into trouble with his daughter when he places a bet against her in the competition

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer starts his own web page and begins revealing the intimate secrets of everyone in Springfield - but ends up making powerful enemies who imprison him on an island. Featuring the voice of Patrick McGoohan

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry is thrilled that he gets to celebrate Christmas now that he is engaged to Lainey. Meanwhile, Murrays brother Marvin makes a promise to Adam with a surprising outcome

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly is in her element as she prepares for Barry and Laineys big day. Geoff worries about Adams shortcomings as a wedding videographer, while Barry begins to have second thoughts about the whole thing

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Gloria uses her time with the twins as an opportunity to secretly baptise them before Haley and Dylan get home. Meanwhile, Claire is still dealing with the fallout from the smart closet fiasco, and Cam is at war with his schools mascot - who is threatening his chance at securing a new college coaching job

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cameron and Mitchells friends mistakenly assume they have split up, while Haley attempts to cook Thanksgiving dinner as a thank you for Claire and Phils support with the twins. Meanwhile, Phil thinks he has a chance to reclaim his dignity after their first outing 10 years ago went so wrong when Jay invites him and Dylan along to fly his model plane

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad members head to the annual Tri-State Cop-Con event, which is usually their excuse for a big party. However, their fun is threatened when Captain Holt asks them to be on their best behaviour.

programme.desc: Amy vanishes shortly before she is due to take her sergeants exam, leaving Jake and Rosa with just a few hours to find her and bring her back to sit the test before it is too late. US cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Melissa Furnero

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.desc: Sarah from Plymouth becomes the first returning picker having previously been on the show as David. Gangster thriller remake, with Al Pacino, Michelle Pfeiffer and Robert Loggia

programme.title: USS Indianapolis: Men of Courage (2016)
programme.desc: A US Navy cruiser delivers the atomic weapons that will eventually be used at Hiroshima and Nagasaki to their destination, only to be sunk on the return journey. The surviving crew members are left stranded in the Philippine Sea for five days, enduring starvation and constant shark attacks. Fact-based Second World War drama, starring Nicolas Cage and Tom Sizemore

programme.title: Any Bullet Will Do (2018)
programme.desc: A bounty hunter travels through Montana and Wyoming to track down his infamous brother for an epic battle that will seal both mens fates. Western, starring Kevin Makely

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Trent and Walker fear for the life of their friend Sandoval when his cover is blown in an undercover operation to catch a drug dealer. Chuck Norris stars

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The gang heads for Vietnam to track down a generals missing daughter. Action adventure, starring Mr T and George Peppard

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: An alien is captured on the main street of a small town - and spontaneously combusts. Roy Thinnes stars

programme.title: Princess of Mars (2009)
programme.desc: Army sniper John Carter is accidentally teleported to a distant alien world in a flawed military experiment. He discovers he is able to perform superhuman feats, but when he is captured and enslaved by the natives, Carter must prove his worth by helping to rescue an endangered princess. Sci-fi thriller, starring Antonio Sabato Jr, Traci Lords, Matt Lasky, Chacko Vadaketh, Mitchell Gordon and Noelle Perris.

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: Two Rode Together (1961)
programme.desc: The desperate relatives of people captured by Comanches many years before put pressure on the US military to bring them home. The army hires a cynical frontier marshal, who agrees to negotiate their release in return for a commission. But the townsfolk are forced to face some grim truths when he returns with just one unrecognisable captive. John Fords Western, with James Stewart, Richard Widmark and Shirley Jones

programme.title: Thunder in the Sun (1959)
programme.desc: Wagon-train scout Lon Bennett leads Basque settlers on a perilous journey to California, where they hope to establish a vineyard. However, Lons open pursuit of Gabrielle, a member of the group, causes friction - particularly for her husband and his brother. Western, starring Susan Hayward, Jeff Chandler and Blanche Yurka

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: The Enterprise team is captured by a beautiful Romulan commander who forces Spock to turn against Captain Kirk and Dr McCoy. Sci-fi adventures, starring William Shatner, Leonard Nimoy and DeForest Kelley

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: A nurse tries to help an injured alien after his saucer crashes - despite Vincents warnings. Sci-fi drama, starring Roy Thinnes

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: Part one of three. General Stockwell blackmails the gang by kidnapping Hannibal and threatening to hurt him if the trio fail to secure the release of hostages held on a plane to Spain

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: An embittered woman jeopardises her life by exposing her abusive husbands drug operation. Drama, starring Chuck Norris

programme.title: Starship Troopers (1997)
programme.desc: Courageous military recruits hurl themselves into a desperate war against alien insects set on destroying mankind. They blast off for the creatures home planet in a last-ditch attempt to save the human race from annihilation - little realising the carnage that awaits them. Sci-fi adventure from director Paul Verhoeven, starring Casper Van Dien, Denise Richards and Dina Meyer

programme.title: Upgrade (2018)
programme.desc: Technophobe Grey Trace is left confined to a wheelchair after being mugged. His only hope for revenge is Stem, an experimental computer chip implant that allows him to control his body. However, once implanted, Stem starts talking to Trace and takes over his body. Sci-fi thriller, starring Logan Marshall-Green and Melanie Vallejo

programme.title: Braven (2018)
programme.desc: A logging company owner and his family find themselves in a dangerous situation when they uncover a drug traffickers hidden stash of cocaine in their cabin. Action thriller, starring Jason Momoa, Garret Dillahunt and Jill Wagner

programme.title: Mojave (2015)
programme.desc: A suicidal artist drives into the desert seeking solitude, hoping to find some meaning in his shallow life. He meets a mysterious drifter who throws his life off course, and must find a way to conquer his depression in order to protect the things he cares about. Thriller, starring Oscar Isaac, Garrett Hedlund and Mark Wahlberg

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The staff of Kings College Hospital in London face a busy day dealing with brain injuries, including 65-year-old cabbie Charlie Brown, whom doctors worry has suffered a haemorrhage in a car accident, and 89-year-old Peggy Pierce, who has been rushed in following a suspected stroke. In the waiting room, a woman is comforted by her ex-boyfriend while she awaits treatment for a cut finger

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Police find a man lying unconscious in the street following a suspected drug overdose. When a man is found collapsed outside his house clutching his chest, the paramedics need to act quickly as he may be having a heart attack. A category one call - the highest priority - comes through for a woman collapsed on her bathroom floor and an elderly woman climbs on a chair to reach a daddy long-legs, with painful consequences

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: This weeks campers - Simon and Emmy, Sean and Marie, and Jen, Ian and Ellis - arrive at Blair Castle Caravan Park at the edge of the Cairngorms National Park

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien repurposes some old suitcases, while Henry Cole gives an old dresser some serious bling

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Retired teachers Carrie and Steve are looking for their dream property in the town of Islantilla on Spains Costa de la Luz. With a budget of £110,000, theyre after a two-bedroom apartment as close to the beach as possible, where they hope to while away the winters. Leah Charles-King lines up five properties for the pair to choose between

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Flamboyant 49-year-old performing arts teacher Helen gets the party started in Sheffield. Her cooking doesnt go to plan, but she certainly delivers on the entertainment, on a whirlwind evening featuring trumping, spies and a dessert that goes with a bang

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Design and technology teacher Claire hosts the second day of the competition in Sheffield, and hopes her Asian-inspired menu with a spot of clay model-making will impress her fellow diners enough to net her the points shell need to secure the cash prize. However, former chef Simon Hollings proves difficult to faze, and the eccentric Helen irritates the other contestants with another audacious display at the dinner table

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Service administrator Monika hosts the third night of a week of dinner parties in Sheffield. She treats her guests to a traditional Bulgarian night inspired by her homeland, in the hope of impressing them enough to win the £1,000 prize money. However, some of the guests are unsure about her Bulgarian delicacies, and the host must fight for control when the two teachers go head to head and when Simon makes sexist jokes

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: After tensions arose between Claire and Helen on Monikas night, 1980s musician Ivor is determined to serve up some fun on his evening in Sheffield. He stages an 80s extravaganza, including a live performance from his new romantic band My Pierrot Dolls

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Former chef Simon hosts the final meal in Sheffield, but is unlikely to get an easy ride from his guests following all the criticism he has dished out at the earlier soirees. He also has to contend with the feud thats brewing between Claire and Helen, and when things boil over between the women, Monika doesnt know where to hide

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition starts at Brockley Hall Hotel in Saltburn-by-the-Sea, North Yorkshire, where owner Heather Garcia and manager Sally Lewis hope to impress their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Alistair Richardson welcomes his rivals to his family owned BandB, The Star Inn 1744, in Thrussington, Leicestershire. The refurbished village pub impresses Steve and Tracy, but Heather and Sallys stay gets off to a far from spotless start

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at Croft Farm Park in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, where site wardens Jason and Michelle Jones are keen to show off their new luxury lodges

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests arrive at Harbour Vista in Poole, Dorset, where most of them have been expecting something lavish - so they are surprised to be staying in owner Steve Websters house

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet for the last time, to find out how much theyve been paid and to settle some scores. Heather and Sally from Brockley Hall Hotel want some answers about why one of their rooms didnt scrub up. Plus, Alistair from The Star Inn 1744 queries his guests cleanliness comments

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw head to Croydon, south London, to rescue a star car that has been wallowing in its own garage for over 30 years. Its owner, Peter, is a serial petrolhead who has been fixing up motors for friends and family for most of his life, putting his own classic vehicle on the back burner. Its a 1964 Volvo P1800 S, one of the most stylish cars to come off any production line, and the vehicle synonymous with cult 1960s TV series The Saint, starring Roger Moore. Tim aims to show the newly refurbished Volvo to Moore, and get his verdict on their efforts

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Car enthusiast Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend take on a 1934 Singer Le Mans two-seater sports car, which had its last outing in 1998. Once the repairs are complete, Tim and Fuzz take the car to the Imperial War Museum at Duxford to reunite it with its owner, 70-year-old farmer John from Cambridgeshire

programme.title: The Dog House Australia
programme.desc: After facing a series of health issues, Josan is on the mend, and her best friend has encouraged her to take the plunge and finally get a dog

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend restore a VW Polo G40, a supercharged hot hatch owned by 43-year-old Anthony, whose dream car was sidelined by an MOT failure in 2007

programme.title: Saving Country Houses with Penelope Keith
programme.desc: In Chillingham in Northumberland, Britains most haunted castle reveals its secrets as four brave visitors go on a night-time ghost hunt. The owners of Iford Manor in Wiltshire buy a pub to sell their own-brand cider in, as they seek to diversify the business. At Whitmore Hall in Staffordshire, the portraits get some long-overdue attention and a clean

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Patients dealt with at Kings College Hospital, London include a man who was stabbed in his own home and has injuries to his lung, arm and liver, and an elderly woman injured in a fall. A former international lawyer who lost his wife, family and home to alcoholism decides to make a change after being treated with care and compassion

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A 77-year-old former motorbike racer arrives with a potentially deadly swelling of the main artery that could burst at any moment. His only option is major surgery, which could be dangerous at his age. A woman whose boyfriend was killed in a cycling accident a year previously is also injured while on her bike, and a medical technician and a mobile caterer talk about their roles in aiding people to recovery

programme.title: Saving Country Houses with Penelope Keith

A woman whose boyfriend was killed in a cycling accident a year previously is also injured while on her bike, and a medical technician and a mobile caterer talk about their roles in aiding people to recovery

programme.title: Supermarkets Unwrapped
programme.desc: The Food Unwrapped team explore the snacks aisle. Kate Quilton visits Kenya to find out how many mangoes are in a snack pack, Helen Lawal learns the mystery of the fluffy centre of a snowball, John Whaite cracks open the secret of caramel popcorn, and Andi Oliver investigates what a supermarket aisle means when youre shopping online

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: Midway through their tour of the Scottish Highlands, Sean and Marie, Jen, Ian and Ellis, and Simon and Emmy pitch up at Ben Nevis Holiday Park, at the foot of the famous landmark

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien discover items including stained glass and a Victorian hay rack that are ready for upcycling to turn a profit for their owners

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: In Mijas Costa, Leah Charles-King helps Susan and Terry, a couple who love this part of southern Spain so much they are eager to find their forever home, where they can settle down and enjoy visits from the family. They give Leah a budget of £120,000 to find them a two-bedroom property near the beach with some outside space, so the presenter sets about lining up five options to show them

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hairdresser Julie hosts the first of a week of dinner parties in Co Durham, hoping to win over her guests with a no-nonsense menu she can prepare in advance. Joining her are tough-talking prison transport officer Tina, dreadlocked farm-dweller Stephen, superior IT manager David and glamorous beauty-school teacher Ashleigh. Alliances are quickly forged when David and Tina discover they both love a good gossip, before they turn their attention to Stephen when David compares him to a tramp. Julie overcooks her beef, but will her hosting make up for it and bag her the £1,000 prize?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Beauty teacher Ashleigh throws the second of the weeks parties in Co Durham, she hopes a menu of sophisticated dishes - along with a helping of hearts and love - will help her win the cash prize. However, cracks were already beginning to show in the diners genial facade yesterday, and the hostess realises she must play peacemaker if she is to keep everyone from falling out

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Call centre complaints officer and part-time farmer Stephen hosts the third night of a week of dinner parties in Co Durham. He hopes to win the £1,000 prize money by impressing his guests with an evening on his farm, featuring a drinks reception and rustic cuisine. However, self-confessed snob Tina makes it perfectly clear what she thinks of his efforts

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Prison transport officer Tina is the fourth host in Co Durham. She hopes to impress her guests with a sophisticated French menu including salmon crepes, chicken and posh peas and pear dessert. But having been highly critical of everyone elses food so far, will they now take the chance to get their own back or can she win them round?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final evening of gatherings in Co Durham sees IT manager David stage a French-themed soiree in the hope of securing the £1,000 prize. However, he soon finds his main challenge is to keep all his guests on friendly terms

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to Inn at the Park in Aberdeen, where for owners Ronnie and Steph Caird, its all about keeping it in the family. When the guests arrive, design-conscious father and son Steve and Allard take a trip back in time, and John isnt flushed with praise for his bathroom. At dinner, John reveals his culinary background, piling on the pressure for Ronnie to deliver a good breakfast. Fiona and Shaunas sizeable confession raises eyebrows, while in the morning, Ronnie has a breakfast to forget and the bathroom blues leave Ronnie and Steph seeking answers from their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to Ingliston Country Club in Renfrewshire, where events manager Shauna Kirk and sales manager Fiona Gallagher prove a force to be reckoned with. Guests Steve and Allard arent feeling the dated decor, and John proves that one size doesnt fit all. Ronnie and Steph are blown away by the competition, but they think that perfection comes at a price

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: For the third visit, the group heads to 1692 Wasdale in the Lake District, where owners Steve and Allard Newell have proudly built their BandB from the ground up

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests stay at the Lynbar Hotel in Blackpool, where Ronnie and Steph have parking problems, while confident owner John ODonnell boasts of serving the best breakfast in town

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet for the last time to settle some scores. Inn at the Park owners Ronnie and Steph Caird are intent on clearing up Johns issues with the toilet

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Car enthusiast Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend visit Plymouth to rescue a 25-year-old example of the worlds bestselling two-seater sports car - the Mazda MX5. The particular motor belongs to former ambulance driver Paul and has been off the road for some time. With a 90s Japanese sports car in the workshop, Tim cant let the chance to try out a few modifications go by

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw restore a 1991 Range Rover, which is a sad reminder of happier days for the owner and her family

programme.title: The Dog House Australia
programme.desc: Life at Animal Welfare League NSW. Following a terrible ordeal, the team hope that neo-mastiff cross Goobers drool wont be too much for Scott and Adelaide, while Mary and Danielle try to heal Cokes broken heart. Plus, Paul and Samuel battle between small and big dogs

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Furniture-maker Lucinda sets out to build a two-storey, highly insulated home entirely out of wood in the woodland near her old family home in South Herefordshire. She enlists the help of her children Dan and Rosie, who grew up learning her craft, to help her £150,000 budget stretch as far as possible

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: An ambitious couple set out to build a revolutionary eco home in the Cotswolds, which will not only use very little energy, it will also produce four times the energy it needs. Environmental consultant Duncan is planning to manage the project himself, moving out of the London home he shares with solicitor Liz to live near the site. But although he is totally committed, he has never faced anything like this before, and almost inevitably the technically complex 18-month build, while living apart takes its toll on the couple

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The medical team faces a range of sport and drink-related injuries on a busy Saturday, including two women hurt when the bar they were dancing on collapsed, and a bricklayer badly cut in an attempted mugging. The nights most dramatic case occurs when a father and son are brought in with life-threatening injuries after being attacked by gatecrashers at a family birthday party, one of whom was armed with a samurai sword

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A call comes in from a GP surgery for a child suffering a severe asthma attack and paramedics are called out to a young woman with multiple sclerosis who is in considerable pain. A man with advanced bowel cancer who is struggling to breathe is seen to by a district nurse so as to avoid a visit to AandE. Plus, a patient is having their 10th nosebleed in 11 days

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Calls to the ambulance service reach new heights in the early hours of Saturday morning as the clubs start to empty. A young woman is found intoxicated by the side of the road and an amateur boxer has vomited in his sleep and is difficult to rouse after losing a fight. Paramedics are called for a woman who has gone into premature labour at 32 weeks

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The medical team faces a range of sport and drink-related injuries on a busy Saturday, including two women hurt when the bar they were dancing on collapsed, and a bricklayer badly cut in an attempted mugging. programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE

Plus, a man who fell from a ladder and landed on his head, and a widower who had a nasty encounter with a mandoline while chopping vegetables

programme.title: Food Unwrapped

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hairdresser Julie hosts the first of a week of dinner parties in Co Durham, hoping to win over her guests with a no-nonsense menu she can prepare in advance. Alliances are quickly forged when David and Tina discover they both love a good gossip, before they turn their attention to Stephen when David compares him to a tramp. Julie overcooks her beef, but will her hosting make up for it and bag her the £1,000 prize?

programme.title: Cleopatra
programme.desc: Part one of two. Dramatised documentary recounting the life of the iconic Egyptian ruler. By the age of 21, Cleopatra had already seen her sister killed by their own father. She became queen of Egypt before escaping almost certain death. Outcast from the royal family and knowing she had nothing to lose, so set about seducing Julius Caesar to ensure the survival of both her dynasty and Egypt itself

programme.title: Egypts Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Part two of two. The Tomb of the Warriors, near Luxor in southern Egypt, contains over 60 mummified bodies, all of which had suffered violent deaths. Though discovered in 1923 before being sealed, the tomb has only recently been investigated for what it can reveal of this lost world

programme.title: America the Bountiful
programme.desc: Capri Cafaro explores the history of the pear in Oregon, from their start in 1847 when an Iowa native brought it to the region to the legislature naming the pear as the state fruit in 2005

programme.title: The Last Days of Anne Boleyn
programme.desc: On Friday, May 19, 1536, Henry VIIIs second wife Anne Boleyn became the first British queen to be executed, but the circumstances of her death remain shrouded in mystery and contradiction. Hilary Mantel, Philippa Gregory and David Starkey are among the leading authors and historians sifting through the evidence to determine why Henry had her killed

programme.title: WWII in Colour: Road to Victory
programme.desc: When the US Air Force develops a new wonder bomber, they want a base close to Japan to launch their raids. Marines are tasked with taking the enemies prized home island of Iwo Jima. US Naval might pummels the island in preparation for an invasion, unaware the Japanese have withdrawn to a central mountain peak and a hidden tunnel network
