programme.desc: Capri Cafaro explores the storied history of the oyster in South Carolina, an ingredient enjoyed by the first Americans and still used today in Gullah Geechee culture

programme.title: The Stuarts
programme.sub-title: And I Will Make Them One Nation
programme.desc: Clare Jackson examines the history of the Stuarts, who grappled with the chaos of three separate kingdoms, multiple religions and civil war during the 17th century. In the opening episode, she looks at James VI of Scotlands attempts to unite his country with England and Ireland and persuade his subjects to feel more British

programme.title: WWII in Colour: Road to Victory
programme.desc: Hitlers Nazi empire is in ruins, but there is still one city to take before the allies can declare victory. But as the British, Americans and Soviets close in on Berlin, new questions about the post-war world start to emerge. Who will rule Europe? And who will take the glory of ending the war?

programme.title: Cleopatra
programme.desc: Part two of two. Dramatised documentary revealing the story of the iconic Egyptian rulers fall from grace in Egypt after the death of Julius Caesar. Plus, how Cleopatra tried to win the heart of Mark Antony, which turned out to be a fatal decision

programme.title: Ancient Egypt: Life and Death in the Valley of the Kings
programme.desc: Egyptologist Joann Fletcher looks at the lives of ordinary Egyptian citizens 3,500 years ago. In the first of two programmes, she explores the conditions of their tightly packed houses, how they dressed and what they ate. Joann also examines their love of poetry, their enthusiasm for interior design and what it was like to work in the Valley of the Kings, where the pharaohs were entombed

programme.desc: As they approach the half-way mark on their journey, Hettie Jago and David Harper are in Brampton, Cumbria. Hettie finds some brooches made centuries apart while David is stunned by a Great War campaign chest, a copper charger and a Bakelite heart-shaped box

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: David Harper and Hettie Jago - Day 4
programme.desc: Hettie Jago and David Harper search the antiques shops of the Lake District. programme.title: Shed and Buried: Classic Cars

programme.title: Richard Hammonds Workshop
programme.desc: With the workshop haemorrhaging money, Richard brings in help. A merchandising scheme backfires when Lewis massively over-orders stock

programme.title: Guz Khans Custom Cars

programme.title: How Do They Do It?

programme.title: How Do They Do It?

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: Crafting accordions, making the horseradish-like wasabi, popularly served with sushi, and producing duck calls that can trick birds

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: How Japanese toilets that provide a wash and blow-dry are made, the techniques used by the US Navy to develop a pilotless helicopter, and the construction of jackhammers

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers World Tour
programme.desc: Mike Brewer and Elvis Priestley hunt for Australias favourite pick up, the Hilux. Despite years of farm use, the boys aim to create the ultimate off-roading beast

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers World Tour

programme.title: Shed and Buried

programme.title: Shed and Buried

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: Barrister Robert Rinder looks into the investigation that followed a number of complaints to the RSPCA from people who had purchased sick and dying dogs. programme.title: Murder on CCTV

programme.title: Deadly Legacy

programme.title: American Monster

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell investigate the case of Maria Roberts, the daughter of Italian parents who had a happy adoption growing up with an English family, and now hopes to find Gilda, her birth mother. The team also meets Francesca Barnes, who is in the early stages of transitioning from male to female. She was born with the name Paul and given up for adoption as a baby. Francesca is now searching for her mother, Norma, but fears her transition may prove too much of a challenge, and lead to rejection

programme.title: Money for Nothing

programme.title: Salvage Hunters

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp and Raj Bisram look for bargains in East Anglia, where they also have a go at step dancing and discover an 18th-century collection of self-playing instruments

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Actress Anna Maxwell Martin researches her family tree. Travelling to the small town in Northern Ireland where her father grew up, her understanding of her grandparents - who suffered a heartbreaking family tragedy - is turned on its head. On her mothers side, Anna starts with her grandfather Maxwell, whose name she added to her own to create her stage name. Looking into his childhood, she uncovers a dark history of domestic abuse and family separation. However, she also discovers extraordinary familial solidarity and love that changed the pattern for the generations that followed

programme.title: Long Lost Family: What Happened Next
programme.desc: Anne Clegg and her mother Janet were first reunited nearly a decade ago. She reveals the impact their successful mother-daughter relationship has had on her life. programme.desc: Mechanical expert Steve Fletcher takes on an ornate but broken clock, while metal expert Dominic Chinea tries to rejuvenate a toy carriage dating from 1911. programme.title: Celebrity Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Angus clears the family home of TV icon Anneka Rice and looks at a collection of quirky items at soap star Antony Cottons Lancashire cottage

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Growing up, Barbara Jacobs always believed that she was one of three children. It was not until she reached her twenties that she made a discovery which would change her life. Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell investigate Barbaras story, and also Sharon Heartes. She was mixed race child adopted by a white family who grew up in the West Midlands. Sharon knew her birth mother, Barbara, was a white woman who worked in a Smethwick bicycle factory, and her father was from Jamaica. She wants to track down her mother to tell her that she understands why she was given up for adoption

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Angela Brennan believed she was adopted, but at 18 her mother revealed she had an older sister, also called Angela, who had been put up for adoption by her parents. Cameras follow Angelas search for her namesake sibling. Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell also examine the story of Bronwen Hook. When her son, Mark, was born, she did her best to raise him, but Bronwen found being responsible for a baby hard, and gave him up for adoption. Shes always hoped she would see Mark again. Will she finally get her chance?

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Richard Osman delves into his Brighton roots and is astonished to discover how his four-times great grandfather turned amateur sleuth and ended up entangled in one of the citys most notorious murder trials. programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?

programme.title: 10 Things to Know About
programme.desc: Kathriona Devereux and Jonathan McCrea explore ways to decarbonise heating, from public buildings to private homes. They look at how district heating systems can be combined with heat pump technology to reduce Irelands reliance on fossil fuels and reduce costs. They also meet researchers who discuss the geology behind geothermal energy, highlight projects investigating potential sources around Ireland - including a few surprising locations that have been using geothermal for decades - and discuss how heat from the Earth could form a crucial part of Irelands supply-and-demand heating network

programme.title: Nationwide
programme.desc: Anne Cassin and Blathnaid Ní Chofaigh present an eclectic mix of reports, features and events from all around the country

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Priya and Ravi remain at odds over whether he should warn Mark. Patrick advises Howie not to waste another day getting Kim back, so he plans a big surprise at the Albert, and there is conflict between Nigels loved ones

programme.title: Eva Paus Asian Kitchen
programme.desc: Eva returns with a fresh selection of recipes bridging the gap between traditional flavours and modern life. She begins by serving up family favourites chicken katsu curry, teriyaki salmon and banana fritters

programme.title: Nevens Ulster Food Tour
programme.desc: Neven Maguire travels through Ulster, celebrating the great food and culture of the province. He packs his bags in Blacklion, Cavan, and heads into Northern Ireland to visit the famous Marble Arch Caves of Enniskillen, County Fermanagh. In County Monaghan, Neven tours family run Carleton Cakes where Dylan Carleton shows Neven how they bake thousands of cakes every day without sacrificing handmade quality

programme.title: RTÉ News: Nine OClock and Weather
programme.desc: The latest national and international news

programme.title: Swindlers
programme.sub-title: Custom House Capital: A House of Cards
programme.desc: The Custom House Capital scandal, one of Irelands most notorious investment frauds, which involved the systematic misappropriation of approximately 61 million euros in client funds. The fallout left more than 2,000 investors, many of whom were retirees, facing devastating financial losses. This documentary allows many of them to tell their stories about how their trust was breached, leaving them facing retirement with just a fraction of their life savings

programme.title: Goodman: Too Big to Fail
programme.desc: The first in a two-part documentary telling the story of Larry Goodman, Irelands most successful business figure, who emerged through a series of crises and controversies to become an overwhelmingly powerful player in the food industry. The story begins with his rise in the meat industry and the even more dramatic and spectacular crash that brought his empire to the very brink

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Violet considers running for Mayor, but fails to notice that Fred isnt his usual cheery self. Events take a dramatic turn and it looks like her campaign will have to be abandoned. A pregnant model who began her career in infancy makes plans for her child to follow in her footsteps. However, when the child is born, Nurse Crane has to help her cope with a difficult diagnosis. Reggie comes home for a few weeks holiday and helps Fred to make-over the small unkempt green space outside St Oswalds church

programme.title: Irelands Fittest Family
programme.desc: For the semi finals at Drogheda Port, the remaining six families will become four as they battle it out for a place in the grand final. All families will face a 1km boat race through the centre of Drogheda, and an icy plunge into the river. The two families at the bottom of each heat will compete in the Eliminator

programme.title: Trackers: The People v The Banks
programme.desc: First of a two-part documentary going behind the headlines to tell the real story of the tracker mortgage scandal through the eyes of the customers most affected

programme.title: Heat My Home
programme.desc: Building engineer Kieran McCarthy meets homeowners attempting to secure energy upgrades on their properties by taking on retrofit challenges

programme.title: Patrick: A Slave to Ireland
programme.desc: Documentary telling the story of Saint Patrick, his mission from Roman Britain to Ireland and how he spread the Christian faith, 1,500 years ago. Featuring re-enactments of the Saints journey, visuals of Ireland, narration from Ciarán Hinds and Ian Hart, as well as historical insights from leading scholars

programme.title: The Irish Civil War
programme.desc: Documentary telling the epic and often challenging story of the origins, conflict and legacy of the civil war that took place in Ireland in 1922 and 1923. Narrated by Brendan Gleeson, the series features extensive film footage, interviews with leading academics, archive interviews with contemporary participants and witnesses and first-hand witness accounts read by actors, all combining to tell one of the most controversial chapters in Irish history

programme.title: Nevens Ulster Food Tour
programme.desc: Neven Maguire travels through Ulster, celebrating the great food and culture of the province. He packs his bags in Blacklion, Cavan, and heads into Northern Ireland to visit the famous Marble Arch Caves of Enniskillen, County Fermanagh. In County Monaghan, Neven tours family run Carleton Cakes where Dylan Carleton shows Neven how they bake thousands of cakes every day without sacrificing handmade quality

programme.title: RTÉ News: Nine OClock and Weather
programme.desc: The latest national and international news

programme.title: Swindlers
programme.sub-title: Custom House Capital: A House of Cards
programme.desc: The Custom House Capital scandal, one of Irelands most notorious investment frauds, which involved the systematic misappropriation of approximately 61 million euros in client funds. The fallout left more than 2,000 investors, many of whom were retirees, facing devastating financial losses. This documentary allows many of them to tell their stories about how their trust was breached, leaving them facing retirement with just a fraction of their life savings

programme.title: Goodman: Too Big to Fail
programme.desc: The first in a two-part documentary telling the story of Larry Goodman, Irelands most successful business figure, who emerged through a series of crises and controversies to become an overwhelmingly powerful player in the food industry. The story begins with his rise in the meat industry and the even more dramatic and spectacular crash that brought his empire to the very brink

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Violet considers running for Mayor, but fails to notice that Fred isnt his usual cheery self. Events take a dramatic turn and it looks like her campaign will have to be abandoned. A pregnant model who began her career in infancy makes plans for her child to follow in her footsteps. However, when the child is born, Nurse Crane has to help her cope with a difficult diagnosis. Reggie comes home for a few weeks holiday and helps Fred to make-over the small unkempt green space outside St Oswalds church

programme.title: Irelands Fittest Family
programme.desc: For the semi finals at Drogheda Port, the remaining six families will become four as they battle it out for a place in the grand final. All families will face a 1km boat race through the centre of Drogheda, and an icy plunge into the river. The two families at the bottom of each heat will compete in the Eliminator

programme.title: Trackers: The People v The Banks
programme.desc: First of a two-part documentary going behind the headlines to tell the real story of the tracker mortgage scandal through the eyes of the customers most affected

programme.title: Heat My Home
programme.desc: Building engineer Kieran McCarthy meets homeowners attempting to secure energy upgrades on their properties by taking on retrofit challenges

programme.title: Patrick: A Slave to Ireland
programme.desc: Documentary telling the story of Saint Patrick, his mission from Roman Britain to Ireland and how he spread the Christian faith, 1,500 years ago. Featuring re-enactments of the Saints journey, visuals of Ireland, narration from Ciarán Hinds and Ian Hart, as well as historical insights from leading scholars

programme.title: The Irish Civil War
programme.desc: Documentary telling the epic and often challenging story of the origins, conflict and legacy of the civil war that took place in Ireland in 1922 and 1923. Narrated by Brendan Gleeson, the series features extensive film footage, interviews with leading academics, archive interviews with contemporary participants and witnesses and first-hand witness accounts read by actors, all combining to tell one of the most controversial chapters in Irish history

Kathryn asks, with 24 per cent of people in the obese range, will almost a quarter of the Irish population be medicated?

programme.title: True Blood
programme.desc: The first episode of the drama from Six Feet Under creator Alan Ball, set in a backwater Louisiana town where vampires live alongside normal people, thanks to the creation of a synthetic blood that quenches their thirst. Anna Paquin stars as telepathic waitress Sookie Stackhouse, who becomes intrigued by 173-year-old vampire Bill Compton after helping save him from a local couple who try to drain his valuable blood - and tests the limits of his gratitude when they are left alone in the dark. Stephen Moyer and Ryan Kwanten co-star

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Theon Greyjoy stirs his men into action as Maester Luwin offers some final advice, Arya receives a gift from the mysterious Jaqen, and Daenerys summons the courage to enter the House of the Undying. Meanwhile, Jon proves his worth as a brother of the Nights Watch to Qhorin Halfhand. Fantasy drama, based on George RR Martins Song of Ice and Fire novels, and starring Maisie Williams, Kit Harington and Alfie Allen

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, Sansa grows in confidence under the watchful eye of the Machiavellian Lord Baelish, while Tyrion is after his just reward for the part he played in the Battle of the Blackwater. In the far North, Jon Snow is brought before formidable wildling leader Mance Rayder (Ciaran Hinds) and attempts to earn the trust of the King-beyond-the-Wall. Across the Narrow Sea, Daenerys Targaryen arrives in Slavers Bay with adviser Ser Jorah Mormont looking to form an army. Fantasy drama based on George RR Martins A Song of Ice and Fire series of novels, starring Peter Dinklage, Emilia Clarke and Kit Harington

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, Shae sneaks into Tyrions chamber to tell him Ros warned her about Baelishs interest in Sansa, who goes to tea with Margaery and her grandmother Lady Olenna and is encouraged to speak freely about Joffrey. Jaime passes the time by taunting his escort Brienne, Arya encounters outlaw group the Brotherhood Without Banners, while Lord Karstark makes Robb aware he no longer has faith in him. Fantasy drama, guest starring Diana Rigg

programme.title: In Treatment
programme.desc: Olivers mother Bess tells Paul that she is moving away to take up an assistant professorship at a university, but is struggling to agree custody arrangements with Luke - and the therapist is distressed when he realises neither of them has been telling the truth to their son. However, as the couples argument becomes increasingly bitter, Paul discovers just how fractured Olivers home life has become

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Everyday life at Northumberlands Chillingham Castle, where the members of staff try to tactfully deal with the whims of their employer, baronet Humphry Wakefield, as the estate prepares to welcome a band of ghost-hunting tourists. Meanwhile, Carlton Towers in East Yorkshire hosts an annual dog show for Afghan hounds

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Maritime Inn landlady Pat gets her first full house of the season as Brixhams tourist trade picks up for the summer - but refuses to hire anyone to help her with the extra work. Powerboat instructor Mike Weatherbee tries to enforce the laws of the sea, carpet-cleaner Dave Satchwill prepares to lead the towns popular ghost tour, and lone fisherman Dave Brown reveals his unusual methods

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: August arrives and the fishermen of Brixham spend time ashore with their families as their boats are repaired - but summer proves costly for Jan, who loses £1,000 for every day his vessel is out of action. Apprentice deckhand Logan has to decide whether a life at sea is the right choice for him and his family, and seafood seller Jenny receives a surprise on her 65th birthday

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Tony grows suspicious of Christophers erratic driving. When they swerve and crash, the mobster realises his nephew is badly injured and spots his chance to take drastic action. Paulie is frustrated by the poor attendance at his mothers wake, while AJ has a setback in therapy when he witnesses a fight

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: AJ is still struggling to make sense of the world and finds comfort in an apocalyptic poem, but as he drifts deeper into depression, his father catches him taking drastic action at the pool. Meadow comes under threat from one of Phil Leotardos men after Tony refuses to cave in over the asbestos deal, and the mobster flies into a rage when he finds out. Meanwhile, AJ tells his parents a few home truths

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Saxon gets work calls, so Timothy enforces a no-phone rule, Chelsea faces danger after going to town with Rick, and Jaclyn pushes Laurie toward Valentin

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Jaclyns resort getaway with friends falls flat when the destination proves less exciting than expected, Piper seeks support for a family announcement aboard a yacht, and Rick reveals his past to Chelsea

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: As a yacht party extends into the night and friends explore Bangkoks clubs, parallel stories unfold with family disagreements over future plans and mysterious happenings at a nearby hotel

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: In the wake of the festivities, Laurie finds herself feeling deceived by Jaclyn, while Saxon tries to bury what happened the night before

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Rick confronts his suspected nemesis in Bangkok. Belinda takes Zion to Chloes party, Saxon questions Timothys behaviour, and Laurie attends Muay Thai with Valentin

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: On their last night at the resort, Laurie, Jaclyn, and Kate are forced to reckon with the changes in their decades-long friendship. Belinda negotiates a deal with Zion that could secure her future, Gaitok shares his plans with a disappointed Mook and Timothy comes up with a shocking plan for his family.

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrion assumes new responsibilities, Jon is taken to the imposing Fist of the First Men, and Jaime strikes a deal with his captors. programme.title: Chernobyl
programme.desc: In April 1986, workers and firefighters put their lives on the line to try to deal with an explosion at the Chernobyl nuclear power plant near the city of Pripyat in Ukraine. Fact-based drama, starring Jared Harris, Emily Watson and Stellan Skarsgard

programme.title: Chernobyl
programme.desc: With millions of lives already at risk, Ulana races to warn leading Soviet nuclear physicist Valery Legasov about the threat of second, devastating explosion

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.sub-title: Trying to Get to Heaven Before They Close the Door
programme.desc: Rue deals with the consequences of her recent relapse in the wake of Jules leaving for New York. Coming-of-age drama, starring Zendaya, Hunter Schafer and Sydney Sweeney

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Jules questions Rue and Elliots new friendship. The lines between fantasy and reality begin to blur as Kat ponders her relationship

programme.title: The Wire
programme.desc: McNulty and Bunk bring DAngelo in for questioning about the murder of the witness who testified against him at his trial. Meanwhile, Detective Greggs informant Bubbles gives her the low-down about the Barksdale crews home turf, before officers Herc, Carver and Prez go there looking for information - but their plan backfires spectacularly. Crime drama, starring Dominic West

programme.title: True Blood
programme.desc: After saving Sookie from the Rattrays, Bill uses his vampire blood to heal her though she suffers strange side effects. In return, she invites him to her house to meet Jason, Tara and Gran, but he struggles to keep his primal urges under control. Supernatural drama, starring Anna Paquin, Stephen Moyer and Sam Trammell

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrion assumes new responsibilities, Jon is taken to the imposing Fist of the First Men, and Jaime strikes a deal with his captors. Meanwhile, Daenerys meets with the slavers as she moves to build an army. Fantasy drama, starring Peter Dinklage, Nikolaj Coster-Waldau and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Lord and Lady Fitzalan Howard try to impress American guests at Carlton Towers with a programme of traditional activities, including skinning rabbits and taking high tea. Meanwhile, Sir Humphry Wakefield entertains tourists on a wine-tasting weekend at Chillingham Castle

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming examines the hidden histories of cities, revealing the sights and sounds rarely witnessed by the public. He begins in London at St Pauls Cathedral, where he visits a place tourists never go, before exploring a hidden park and a little-known church. He also gets a guided tour of Soho from broadcaster Danny Baker

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming tours the less-celebrated sights of Brighton, beginning by visiting the Toy and Model Museum to look at its collection of model trains. He then discovers a boutique that sells a variety of unusual items, before taking a glimpse behind the scenes at the Royal Pavilion

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Tony receives a warning about Phil Leotardos plan to take action against him, prompting the mobster to draft in Paulie to make the first move. However, an innocent family becomes the victim of mistaken identity when the Italians open fire in Queens. Elsewhere, Dr Melfi ends Tonys therapy sessions. Drama, starring James Gandolfini and Frank Vincent

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: In the last-ever episode of the crime drama, Tony and Carmela come out of hiding to attend Uncle Bobbys funeral before the mobster and Paulie set out to track down Phil, while Meadow and Patrick plan their wedding. Starring James Gandolfini

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: Shiv shows up in search of answers when Kendall and Roman head to the UK to negotiate with their mother. Meanwhile, Greg goes to great lengths to protect himself

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: The entire Roy clan travels to Logans hometown of Dundee for a celebration of Logans 50 years in the business, while Kendall becomes enamoured with Jennifer

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: Logan, Kendall, Gerri and Tom testify before Congress, while Shiv speaks candidly to Kira, a victim who is set to be a key witness. Romans business pitch takes a chilling turn

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: Logan weighs up whether a member of the family, or a top lieutenant, will need to be sacrificed to salvage the companys tarnished reputation. Roman shares his hesitations about a new source of financing, as Kendall suggests a familiar alternative

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: As the Roy family are left reeling in the wake of his unexpected public attack on his fathers empire, Kendall plans his next move. Starring Brian Cox and Jeremy Strong

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: Kendall tries to find more allies in his fight to take over control of Waystar. Meanwhile, Greg turns to his grandfather for help

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: With the Department of Justice breathing down his neck, Logan summons his arsenal. Meanwhile, Tom makes a potentially life altering offer

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: Logan and Kendall have their first meeting together with Josh, a major investor worried about their family feud. Starring Brian Cox and Jeremy Strong

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Lord Tywin plans strategic unions for the Lannisters, Melisandre visits the Riverlands and Robb weighs up a compromise to repair his alliance with House Frey. programme.sub-title: The Bear and the Maiden Fair
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, Sansa frets about her prospects, Tyrions new situation agitates Shae, and Tywin counsels the king. Emilia Clarke and Peter Dinklage star in an episode written by George RR Martin, whose novels form the basis for the series

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming visits Liverpool, cutting through cliches about football and the Beatles to explore its less-celebrated treasures. Among his destinations are a 1930s banking building that has remained unaltered since closing in 2007, a well-appointed set of toilets and a recording studio hidden in a bar. He also discovers which former dictator once spent Christmas in the city

programme.title: Salems Lot (2024)
programme.desc: A writer attempts to destroy vampires in a small American town. Horror based on Stephen Kings novel of the same name, starring Lewis Pullman, Makenzie Leigh, Jordan Preston Carter and Alfre Woodard

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn 2: Texas Blood Money (1999)
programme.desc: A bank robber is bitten by a vampire, spelling trouble for his partners in crime, who find themselves trapped in their hideout with a bloodsucking terror. Horror sequel, starring Robert Patrick, Bo Hopkins, Duane Whitaker, Muse Watson and Tiffani-Amber Thiessen

programme.title: A Quiet Place (2018)
programme.desc: Two parents do whatever it takes to keep their children safe in a world full of creatures hunting every sound they hear. Nothing can be heard from the family hiding in silence, but all it takes is one noise and everything can go horrifically wrong. Horror, starring real-life husband-and-wife duo Emily Blunt and John Krasinski, who also directed

programme.title: A Quiet Place: Day One (2024)
programme.desc: During a day trip to watch a theatre performance, terminally ill cancer patient Sam witnesses Earths terrifying first contact with the Death Angels - sightless creatures, which hunt by sound. Calmly resigned to her demise, she embarks on a lonely trek to Harlem to enjoy a final slice of pizza from the restaurant where her late father took her as a child. Horror prequel, starring Lupita Nyongo, Joseph Quinn and Alex Wolff

programme.title: Ma (2019)
programme.desc: A lonely woman allows a group of teenagers to throw a party in her basement, provided they follow some simple rules - one of which is to always call her Ma. Over the course of the night, their kindly host shows a far more sinster side to her nature - and her young guests find themselves trapped in a nightmare. Horror, starring Octavia Spencer and Juliette Lewis

programme.title: Wolf Man (2025)
programme.desc: After a family barricade themselves inside their remote farmhouse when a creature attacks, a father slowly transforms into something unrecognisable. Werewolf horror from The Invisible Man director Leigh Whannell, starring Christopher Abbott, Julia Garner, Matilda Firth and Sam Jaeger

programme.title: Critters (1986)
programme.desc: Murderous alien beasties escape from their space prison and flee to Earth, where they wreak havoc in a sleepy Kansas village as they discover the delights of snacking on human flesh - and only two intergalactic bounty hunters look capable of saving the day. Madcap horror comedy, starring Dee Wallace Stone, M Emmet Walsh, Billy Green Bush and Scott Grimes

programme.title: Until Dawn (2025)
programme.desc: A year after their friend disappeared, a group find themselves trapped in a time loop, where they are hunted and killed unless they survive until dawn. Video game-inspired horror, starring Ella Rubin, Michael Cimino and Odessa Azion

programme.title: Nosferatu (2024)
programme.desc: In 1838 Germany, Thomas Hutter is sent to the Carpathian mountains to secure the signature of enigmatic nobleman Count Orlok on a property sale in the German city of Wisborg. Thomas leaves his bride Ellen in the care of friend Friedrich Harding and his wife Anna. The young man barely survives the exhausting trip to Europe and stumbles home to find Ellen driven to delirium by a telepathic bond to the Count. Director Robert Eggers version of the Dracula-inspired horror, starring Bill Skarsgard, Lily-Rose Depp, Nicholas Hoult and Aaron Taylor-Johnson

programme.title: The Nun (2018)
programme.desc: A troubled priest and a novice nun discover a religious orders terrible secret and battle a malevolent force while investigating the apparent suicide of a Romanian nun. Fifth instalment in The Conjuring Universe horror saga, starring Taissa Farmiga and Demián Bichir

programme.title: Annabelle (2014)
programme.desc: A man buys his pregnant wife a vintage doll, which places their lives in jeopardy. Members of a Satanic cult have their eyes on the antique toy, and break into their house to prepare a ritual that will transform the harmless plaything into a terrifying monster. Horror spin-off from The Conjuring, starring Annabelle Wallis and Ward Horton

programme.title: Annabelle: Creation (2017)
programme.desc: Twelve years after the death of their little girl, a dollmaker and his wife welcome a nun and several girls from an orphanage into their home. There they become the target of the craftsmans possessed creation, Annabelle. Horror, starring Anthony LaPaglia, Samara Lee and Miranda Otto.

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer (2025)
programme.desc: A group of friends are terrorised by a stalker who knows about a gruesome secret from their past. Horror reboot, starring Madelyn Cline and Chase Sui Wonders

programme.title: MaXXXine (2024)
programme.desc: In 1980s Hollywood, adult film star and aspiring actress Maxine Minx finally gets her big break. But as a mysterious killer stalks the starlets of Tinseltown, a trail of blood threatens to reveal her sinister past. The third instalment of director Ti Wests acclaimed X film series, starring Mia Goth, Lily Collins, Giancarlo Esposito and Kevin Bacon

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn 3: The Hangmans Daughter (2000)
programme.desc: Prequel to the acclaimed horror tale, in which a band of Western outlaws and unfortunate travellers stumble across a remote bar inhabited by suspicious looking characters _ who turn out to be vampires. Marco Leonardi, Michael Parks and Temuera Morrison star

Sci-fi thriller sequel, starring Violet McGraw, Jemaine Clement and Allison Williams

Danny Boyles horror thriller sequel, starring Jodie Comer, Aaron Taylor-Johnson, Ralph Fiennes and Rocco Haynes

programme.desc: A writer attempts to destroy vampires in a small American town. Horror based on Stephen Kings novel of the same name, starring Lewis Pullman, Makenzie Leigh, Jordan Preston Carter and Alfre Woodard

programme.title: The Crazies (2010)
programme.desc: The sheriff of a quiet little town investigates a series of unexpected murders, trying to work out what could have driven seemingly normal, well-adjusted people to kill. He discovers that a toxic chemical has turned many of the townsfolk into bloodthirsty maniacs, leaving those unaffected battling for survival. Horror remake, with Timothy Olyphant and Radha Mitchell

programme.title: The Radleys (2024)
programme.desc: A seemingly ordinary family hide a dark secret, but eventually parents Helen and Peter are forced to confront who they are, with the help of Peters twin brother, Will. Director Euros Lyns horror comedy co-written by Jo Brand, starring Kelly Macdonald, Damian Lewis and Sophia Di Martino

programme.title: Bring Her Back (2025)
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Andy and his visually impaired younger stepsister Piper discover their father dead in the shower. Single mother Laura agrees to take in Andy and Piper until the traumatised youngster comes of age and can apply for legal guardianship of his stepsister. programme.title: Murder in the Alps
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the 2012 murder of British computer engineer Saad Al-Hilli, his dentist wife Ikbal, and her mother Suhaila in the woods near Lake Annecy, a case that has gone unsolved for 10 years. Caught up in a media whirlwind, Saads brother Zaid was eventually arrested under suspicion of conspiracy to murder and accused of organising the killings of his brother and family over an inheritance dispute, but was cleared and released. Telling the full story for the first time, Zaid is joined by former French prosecutor Eric Maillaud, retired British senior investigating officer Mark Preston, and journalist Tom Parry

programme.title: Murder in the Alps
programme.desc: The second episode sees Saad Al-Hillis brother Zaid arrested on suspicion of conspiracy to murder, and follows leads that take investigators to Switzerland, Iraq and the USA. Detectives hunt for a motorcyclist with a distinctive helmet spotted near the crime scene, the FBI help to uncover a secret marriage, journalists dig into connections with the Iraqi regime, and police find a Swiss bank account containing almost a million euros

programme.desc: Money plays a decisive role in the battle between truth and lies. From antiquity to the present day, the powerful have used their wealth to influence all areas of social interaction in their favour. Whether art and culture, science or politics, nothing seems to be safe from the power of money and the influence of those who possess it

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The Pickers look for hidden memorabilia by digging through junk piles, abandoned barns and neglected garages. Mike Wolfe and Jersey Jon turbo-pick a mint-condition stockpile in Tennessee. Later, in Kentucky, they unearth a bonanza of vintage treasures at a 1950s drive-in

programme.title: Forged in Fire

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Part two of two. Janeway and her team endeavour to set the drones free and infiltrate the Borg Cube using special implants, but the Queen will go to any length to prevent her minions regaining their individuality. Tuvok falls prey to the Collective mind and the rest of the group is captured. Sci-fi drama, starring Susanna Thompson and Kate Mulgrew

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Federation concludes a peace treaty with the Cardassians that reassigns several planets, including one populated by American Indians. Picard is tasked to relocate the tribe to a new home, and soon encounters opposition to the plan. Meanwhile, Wesley sees a vision of his late father who tells him to take a different path in life. Patrick Stewart and Wil Wheaton star

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: Cutter sets out to unmask the ARC traitor, only for his plans to be interrupted when a giant mammoth appears on a busy motorway in broad daylight. The team rushes to the site, and eventually manages to trap the beast in the back of a lorry - but suspiciously, Stephen is nowhere to be found. Douglas Henshall stars, with an appearance by Ramon Tikaram

Big Boy Beni has a gum infection and is put on an even stricter diet, which means his beloved bananas are off the menu, and it is an extremely emotional moment for staff when five adult orangutans are at last set free in the wild

programme.desc: An incompetent scientist finally invents something that works - a machine that turns water into food. When the device gets launched into the atmosphere, it has a strange effect on his towns weather, causing giant meals to fall from the sky to the delight of the residents - until it gets out of control. Animated comedy, with the voices of Bill Hader, Anna Faris and James Caan

programme.title: The Amazing Maurice (2022)
programme.desc: A streetwise cat has the perfect money-making scam after finding a pipe-playing kid who has a horde of strangely literate rats. Animated adventure based on the Terry Pratchett story, featuring the voices of Hugh Laurie, Emilia Clarke and David Thewlis

programme.desc: Three orphans are entrusted into the care of their sinister uncle, a master of disguise who intends to kill them for the family fortune. Quickly realising he is up to no good, the children flee, moving from one prospective guardian to the next - but their wily relative is never far behind. Comedy adventure based on the childrens books, starring Jim Carrey, Meryl Streep, Jude Law, Liam Aitken and Emily Browning, with Kara and Shelby Hoffman

programme.title: The BFG (2016)
programme.desc: An orphaned girl befriends a benevolent giant, who takes her off to a magical land, where they attempt to stop the man-eating creatures that are invading the human world. Steven Spielbergs fantasy adventure based on Roald Dahls book, starring Mark Rylance, Ruby Barnhill and Penelope Wilton

programme.desc: When Papa Smurf is taken by evil wizards Razamel and Gargamel, Smurfette leads her fellow blue creatures on a mission to the real world to save him. Live-action animated musical fantasy comedy, featuring the voices of Rihanna, James Corden and Nick Offerman

programme.title: Stardust (2007)
programme.desc: A young shop assistant in Victorian England enters a magical parallel world in search of a fallen star to give to the girl of his dreams. However, the star in question is in fact a beautiful woman, who he helps flee from a wicked witch and a murderous prince. Fantasy adventure, based on Neil Gaimans novel, with Charlie Cox, Claire Danes, Michelle Pfeiffer, Robert De Niro, Mark Strong and Sienna Miller. Narrated by Ian McKellen

programme.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory (2005)
programme.desc: Penniless Charlie Bucket is one of five lucky children who find a golden ticket in a chocolate bar, winning a once-in-a-lifetime tour of eccentric recluse Willy Wonkas magical sweet company. Unfortunately, the other winners each face a grim fate when they start to misbehave. Tim Burtons childrens fantasy, based on Roald Dahls novel, starring Johnny Depp, Freddie Highmore, Helena Bonham Carter, and Deep Roy playing all the Oompa Loompas

programme.title: The BFG (2016)
programme.desc: An orphaned girl befriends a benevolent giant, who takes her off to a magical land, where they attempt to stop the man-eating creatures that are invading the human world. Steven Spielbergs fantasy adventure based on Roald Dahls book, starring Mark Rylance, Ruby Barnhill and Penelope Wilton

programme.title: The Witches (1990)
programme.desc: A boy goes on holiday with his grandmother to a seaside hotel hosting a convention of witches, who have come together to hear their leaders plan to turn all the children in England into mice. When the chief hag discovers the young lad eavesdropping at their meeting, she decides to make him one of her first victims. Childrens fantasy directed by Nicolas Roeg, based on the book by Roald Dahl, and starring Anjelica Huston, Mai Zetterling, Jasen Fisher, Jane Horrocks, Rowan Atkinson and Brenda Blethyn

programme.title: Lemony Snickets A Series of Unfortunate Events (2004)
programme.desc: Three orphans are entrusted into the care of their sinister uncle, a master of disguise who intends to kill them for the family fortune. Quickly realising he is up to no good, the children flee, moving from one prospective guardian to the next - but their wily relative is never far behind. Comedy adventure based on the childrens books, starring Jim Carrey, Meryl Streep, Jude Law, Liam Aitken and Emily Browning, with Kara and Shelby Hoffman

programme.title: Peter Pan (2003)
programme.desc: The adventures of the boy who never grows old, as he whisks Wendy Darling and her brothers away to the magical world of Neverland - where they come face to face with fearsome Captain Hook. Adaptation of JM Barries fantasy novel, starring Jeremy Sumpter, Rachel Hurd-Wood, Jason Isaacs and Lynn Redgrave

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat (2003)
programme.desc: Two bored youngsters are led on a series of zany misadventures when a manic moggy comes knocking at their door with a magical stovepipe hat on his head and mischief in mind. Comedy fantasy based on the childrens book by Dr Seuss, starring Mike Myers, Alec Baldwin, Dakota Fanning and Spencer Breslin

programme.title: Babe (1995)
programme.desc: A kindly farmer wins a cute piglet, which some greedy humans and jealous animals hope will end up as the Christmas roast. Family comedy, starring James Cromwell and Magda Szubanski, with Christine Cavanaugh, Miriam Margolyes and Hugo Weaving among those providing the voices of the animal characters

Musical fantasy, with Judy Garland, Ray Bolger, Jack Haley, Bert Lahr and Frank Morgan

programme.title: Send in the Dogs
programme.desc: Sgt Midgley tries to qualify as a dog handler after 24 years on the force but 14-month-old springer spaniel Ruby puts both their futures in jeopardy. programme.title: Air Ambulance ER
programme.desc: Documentary following Britains emergency helicopter medical services. Finally, the search is on for a lost paraglider - yielding surprising results

programme.desc: Nichols and Stevens are called to the scene when Ryan Foley, the owner of a popular food van, is found dead in an airport parking lot. Could the pair have been on a lovers trip to the city? The detectives also discover a rival operator may have let slip knowledge of the affair to the politician. Starring Jeff Goldblum and Saffron Burrows

programme.title: Send in the Dogs

Narrated by Ken Stott

programme.desc: This episode tells the stories of four horses much loved by Irish racing fans. Limestone Lad - bred, trained and owned by the Bowe family in Gathabawn. They begin with Donegal student Mollaí Ní Mhiacháin, who spends 80 per cent of her income on clothes and admits that shopping is her only hobby. Caoimhe challenges Mollaí to survive the next two weeks using just 10 items of clothing selected from her wardrobes. In Irish

programme.title: Bailte
programme.desc: Síle Nic Chonaonaigh visits An Baile Riabhach, a townland just west of Dingle in Co. Kerry. Here she meets the locals, many of whom are descendants of the people who moved into the area through the Land Commission schemes of the 1950s. She meets Toose Mac Gearailt, a man with an extraordinary knowledge of the Irish language and a source of countless unusual words, many now out of use. Síle gives a hand to some of the women from the village who are baking treats for the sunrise Mass and pattern to be held on Easter Sunday morning

programme.title: Caomhnoirí na Talún
programme.desc: Across the countryside recent years have seen catastrophic declines of birds, wild bees and native plants. Even once common birds like the skylark and kestrel are now in trouble. The intensification of farming and forestry is seen as one of the most significant contributors to these losses, but if biodiversity is to improve that change will happen across Irish farmland. This documentary follows five farmers as they farm with nature, as they create or conserve habitats on their farms, pioneer new ideas and try to protect wildlife and their living

Banksy experts take a risk on a piece of wall featuring work attributed to the anonymous artist and Tommy Coopers iconic fez goes on sale. Plus, a jar of pickled pig foetuses and an array of Buzzcocks memorabilia

programme.title: Hello Campers
programme.desc: Former bluecoat Mark Goddard gets to grips with sandwiches by the seaside, volleyball, bingo and karaoke as he takes a tour through the history of holiday camps. In the first episode, he meets a group of families whove taken their annual break at the same place in Norfolk for more than 30 years, and tries his hand at a traditional sport _ welly-wanging

programme.title: New Home DIY
programme.desc: DIY expert Dave Wellman visits Warwickshire. Coming to the rescue of a woman whose bathroom is ruining her life

programme.title: New Home DIY
programme.desc: Dave is in Birmingham, working with a reinforced concrete fire surround

programme.title: Supermarket Secrets Revealed
programme.desc: Consumer show lifting the lid on secrets the major food retailers would rather keep to themselves

programme.title: The Greatest Auction
programme.desc: AJ Odudu hosts as collectors bid for a pinball machine signed by Elton John, a fork liberated from Saddam Husseins palace and a prototype mid-century chair brought in by two sisters who have different feelings about it but are equally desperate to sell it. Plus a 1940s fly-o-plane fairground attraction that was once used to train fighter pilots

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: The team head to Wilmslow to help Adam and Lauren transform their unsafe plot into a Chinese inspired family space with a woodland twist on a budget of £7,000

programme.title: The Wild Gardener
programme.desc: After 30 years of filming the creatures of the world, wildlife cameraman Colin Stafford-Johnson returns home on a personal project - to turn his old childhood garden into a haven for native wildlife. He begins by getting down and dirty, digging ponds, clearing scrub, planting woodland and sowing meadows as he tries to figure out how best to lure the wild creatures back

programme.title: Edwardian Farm
programme.desc: Empire Day approaches and a paddle steamer docks at the Morwellham Quay for the first time in 80 years. Such vessels were frequent visitors when Edwardian tourists first began to visit the Tamar Valley, and Alex Langlands, Peter Ginn and Ruth Goodman put on a party for the passengers, but have to learn how to make clotted cream and the Devonshire version of a scone. Plus, the trio harvest their strawberries

programme.title: Au Pair Girls (1972)
programme.desc: A group of foreign girls travel to England to work as au pairs, but they are easily distracted from their new jobs by the men they meet. Comedy, starring Gabrielle Drake, Astrid Frank and Johnny Briggs

programme.title: Can You Keep it Up for a Week? (1974)
programme.desc: A workshy mans fiancee challenges him to hold down a steady job - a situation that puts him squarely in the path of temptation. Comedy, starring Richard OSullivan, Jeremy Bulloch, Neil Hallett and Jill Damas

programme.title: The Wild Gardener
programme.desc: After 30 years of filming the creatures of the world, wildlife cameraman Colin Stafford-Johnson returns home on a personal project - to turn his old childhood garden into a haven for native wildlife. programme.title: Flipping Profit
programme.desc: Antiques auctioneer Charles Hanson, top trader Linda Lambert and trendy upcycler Zoe Pocock head to Glastonbury to find some bargains they can turn into some flipping profit. Rummaging through antique shops, scrap yards and flea markets, they only have one day to each find those hidden second-hand or used gems that will make them a nice big profit

programme.title: Edwardian Farm
programme.desc: The team heads to Dartmoor to find out how shepherds took advantage of the landscape to boost their income, taking their flocks there for summer grazing. Alex Langlands and Peter Ginn get to grips with shearing, while Ruth Goodman visits a wool mill to learn how the fleeces were processed and manufactured. Land agent Rupert Acton and his family join the trio for a picnic, before using historic maps to follow an authentic Edwardian hiking trail

programme.title: The Greatest Auction
programme.desc: The bidders compete for two vintage Hermes handbags and a print by street artist Invader sells for 100 times what the seller paid for it. A 1970s illuminated furniture shop sign sells on the flip of a coin and a skateboard designed by Virgil Abloh goes up for sale

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock, Flo Headlam and the team are in Burton Latimer, Northamptonshire, to help Gareth and Rob transform their boring garden into a Mediterranean-themed social space on an £8,000 budget

programme.title: The Wild Gardener
programme.desc: Colin Stafford-Johnson continues to transform his childhood garden into a haven for wildlife. Rain finally arrives and the garden is transformed - ponds burst with dragonflies and damselflies, meadows explode in flower and the much-awaited hum of life can be heard everywhere. Colin Stafford-Johnson encounters his first nest of the year, a real milestone for the project and he explores the life cycle of the much overlooked solitary bees

programme.title: Edwardian Farm
programme.desc: The team heads to Dartmoor to find out how shepherds took advantage of the landscape to boost their income, taking their flocks there for summer grazing. programme.title: Adventures of a Private Eye (1977)
programme.desc: A detectives search for a blackmailer is hampered by a succession of voluptuous women who cannot seem to resist his manly charms. Sex comedy, starring Christopher Neil, Suzy Kendall, Harry H Corbett, Irene Handl and Liz Fraser

programme.title: Death Train (1993)
programme.desc: A mercenary is hired to transport a nuclear device across Europe and get it to Iraq without arousing the suspicions of the undercover cops looking for him - little suspecting that a crack team of special agents, led by Pierce Brosnan, is closing in. Clumsy thriller which only manages to deliver in the closing scenes, also starring Patrick Stewart, Alexandra Paul, Christopher Lee and Ted Levine

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A scientist studying a live volcano is found dead halfway up the mountain, and the evidence points to a heart attack. Humphrey is convinced one of the dead mans colleagues murdered him - an unlikely possibility, since they all have alibis. Away from the investigation, the inspector eagerly awaits Marthas return to the island, while JP settles into married life and Dwayne makes an error of judgment while talking to a journalist. Kris Marshall, Josephine Jobert and Danny John-Jules star in the sun-soaked whodunit, with guest appearances from Douglas Hodge, Natasha Little and Sally Bretton

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.sub-title: The Secret of the Flame Tree
programme.desc: The Saint Marie Literary Festival is rocked by the death of a young literature student - and Florences childhood friend - whose body is discovered at the bottom of a cliff. Suicide seems the likely cause, but as ever Humphrey isnt so keen to jump to conclusions - even with the presence of a note in the victims bag. But with everyone the dead girl knew at the festival, who could have pushed her over the edge? Away from the investigation, the inspector is busy preparing the shack for Marthas stay. Sun-soaked whodunit, guest starring Fiona Allen, Ramon Tikaram and Monica Dolan

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: When Gillian Fletcham reveals a talent scout is heading to Kembleford to find dancers for TV sensation Go Dancing, Mrs Devine and Brenda are delighted. As the showcase nears, Father Brown is shocked at how cut throat the world of competitive dancing is. Gillian dumps her regular dance partner, her brother Derek Fletcham in favour of Italian Stallion Mario Cantoloni, while award-winning couple Pauline Danbury and Robert Danbury find the pressure a strain on their relationship. The very next day, Gillian is found murdered at the dance school. Derek is firmly in the frame, but Father Brown isnt convinced and investigates the dancing rivalries. Fifties-set crime drama, guest starring Kevin Clifton, with Mark Williams

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Benedict Dacre rules the roost at his coffee plantation, although all is not plain sailing - and soon after he breaks the news that he is selling up and it is time for his family to move on, he is shot dead. As DI Mooney and the team investigate, they soon have reason to suspect all the victims relatives. But which one of them had enough reason to pull the trigger? Meanwhile, Ruby confesses to JP she was once arrested and the Commissioner is concerned about illegal crab racing. Anna Chancellor guest stars as the victims sister - and one of the suspects

programme.desc: In the last-ever episode of the American crime drama, Lisbon rushes into the building after the explosion as she is desperate to find Jane, who emerges relatively unscathed, but there is no sign of Joe Keller and it is assumed he did not survive. programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Humphrey and Marthas romantic weekend on a remote island is cut short when the hotel owner is stabbed to death in his room in what appears to be an attempted robbery. Theres just one problem - since the DI had a direct view of the only staircase leading up to the room, he is the alibi for all the suspects. Meanwhile, JP worries about his marriage and seeks relationship advice from Dwayne

programme.desc: Past and present collide when the sleuth investigates the macabre world of dolls house crime scenes. Crime drama based on the stories by GK Chesterton, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: The hunt for the fingernail-stealing serial killer continues and Jane agrees to masquerade as a renowned psychic and be used as bait in an attempt to lure out the murderer. As he is leaving a studio after an appearance on a TV programme, Janes car is rammed and he is knocked unconscious - waking up to find himself shackled to a table. Simon Baker stars

programme.title: Hudson and Rex
programme.desc: A convicted killer resorts to drastic measures to avoid deportation, leading Charlie and Rex to reopen his case

programme.title: The Coroner
programme.desc: Lighthaven is stunned when a teenage girl appears to return from the dead, leaving the town to wonder where she has been for a year and who is buried in her place

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.sub-title: The Secret of the Flame Tree
programme.desc: The Saint Marie Literary Festival is rocked by the death of a young literature student - and Florences childhood friend - whose body is discovered at the bottom of a cliff. Suicide seems the likely cause, but as ever Humphrey isnt so keen to jump to conclusions - even with the presence of a note in the victims bag. But with everyone the dead girl knew at the festival, who could have pushed her over the edge? Away from the investigation, the inspector is busy preparing the shack for Marthas stay. Sun-soaked whodunit, guest starring Fiona Allen, Ramon Tikaram and Monica Dolan

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Benedict Dacre rules the roost at his coffee plantation, although all is not plain sailing - and soon after he breaks the news that he is selling up and it is time for his family to move on, he is shot dead. As DI Mooney and the team investigate, they soon have reason to suspect all the victims relatives. But which one of them had enough reason to pull the trigger? Meanwhile, Ruby confesses to JP she was once arrested and the Commissioner is concerned about illegal crab racing. Anna Chancellor guest stars as the victims sister - and one of the suspects

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: In the last-ever episode of the American crime drama, Lisbon rushes into the building after the explosion as she is desperate to find Jane, who emerges relatively unscathed, but there is no sign of Joe Keller and it is assumed he did not survive. While the FBI waits for confirmation of the serial killers death using DNA found at the site, Jane purchases the lakeside cottage he showed Lisbon previously and asks for her hand in marriage. Simon Baker and Robin Tunney star

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Humphrey and Marthas romantic weekend on a remote island is cut short when the hotel owner is stabbed to death in his room in what appears to be an attempted robbery. But since the flower beds outside the window are undisturbed, Humphrey is certain that one of the victims associates played a part in his death. Theres just one problem - since the DI had a direct view of the only staircase leading up to the room, he is the alibi for all the suspects. Meanwhile, JP worries about his marriage and seeks relationship advice from Dwayne

programme.title: Cannonball
programme.desc: Andrew Flintoff hosts the action-packed game show, in which 24 contestants are tasked with traversing a series of water-based challenges and custom-made inflatable obstacles, each designed to test their speed, accuracy, height and distance. The most successful contestants then claim a chance to launch themselves cannonball-style at a moving target on the surface of a deep-water tank, all in the hope of nabbing the shows priceless Cannonball Cup. Frankie Bridge, Radzi Chinyanganya, Ryan Hand and Maya Jama all join Andrew at the poolside to commentate on the action

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers in Progreso detain a man who makes a dash back towards Mexico, and the team in Laredo uncovers methamphetamine concealed in a shipment of landscaping stone

programme.title: Rick Steins Spain

programme.desc: Best friends and Derry Girls co-starsJamie-Lee ODonnell and Saoirse-Monica Jackson head way out of their comfort zone. This is their fifth trip away together in a year, but unlike the previous four holidays, this one is an off-road adventure to the rugged mountains of Romania

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The presenters try to make an ordinary second-hand car lap the test track as fast as a new, purpose-built sports saloon. James May meets former Formula 1 World Champion Mika Hakkinen to discover why Finns are such good racing drivers, Richard Hammond tests the Veritas sports car, and actor Mark Wahlberg is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The presenters are challenged to drive from Switzerland to Blackpool on just one tank of fuel, and the winner gets to switch on the Blackpool illuminations. James May also power-tests the Pagani Zonda F Roadster, and the Stig sets a lap time in the Bugatti Veyron. Comedian Harry Enfield is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers find a suspicious compartment within the trailer of a truck returning to Texas, and a man hides over 300 cheap forms of medication about his person in Progreso

programme.title: Railroad Australia
programme.desc: A super-sized freight train makes its way through the desert wilderness on a 1,900-mile journey to its destination. Plus, Leigh and Wil prove their worth against a crocodile

programme.title: Rick Stein: From Venice to Istanbul
programme.desc: The chef takes a gastronomic road trip to Istanbul through the countries of the former Byzantine Empire - a melting pot of East and West. His journey begins in the city of Venice, and on the idyllic Greek island of Symi he cooks some of his favourite Venetian dishes including seafood risotto, tiramisu and gnocchi with spider crab

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Customs and Border Protection officers think they have spotted a trend when they seize drugs from behind the dashboards of two cars. A Mexican woman asks officers for protection

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers in Hidalgo are forced to close the bridge when its stormed by dozens of asylum seekers trying to jump the queue of people waiting to seek refuge in the USA

programme.title: Worlds Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: This comedy pair have only recently got to know each other and couldnt be more different - Darren is a former bouncer and self-confessed city boy with an obsession for social media, and Ria is full of adventurous spirit with a PhD and autism. Shes persuaded him to go rogue and hit South Africa, and its 1.2 million square kilometres of wilderness just waiting to be explored. They begin their 800km journey getting to know each other better in Cape Town before heading inland and off-road, tackling ancient valleys, jagged mountains and vast plains seeking out adventure on their way to the tip of the continent. This whirlwind trip into nature and the unknown helps them both face things in life they find a challenge

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Richard Hammond celebrates the 40th anniversary of the Ferrari Daytona by taking one back to its spiritual home - the Italian Riviera - before trying to beat James May and a powerboat in a race from Portofino to St Tropez. programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson and James May ask whether the Eastern Bloc countries ever made a good car, and Richard Hammond assesses the performance of German sports model the Veritas. The Ford Fiesta is also put through its paces in a stringent road test, and Mayor of London Boris Johnson is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear

programme.title: Top Gear

Shes persuaded him to go rogue and hit South Africa, and its 1.2 million square kilometres of wilderness just waiting to be explored. They begin their 800km journey getting to know each other better in Cape Town before heading inland and off-road, tackling ancient valleys, jagged mountains and vast plains seeking out adventure on their way to the tip of the continent. This whirlwind trip into nature and the unknown helps them both face things in life they find a challenge

programme.title: The Yorkshire Steam Railway: All Aboard
programme.sub-title: A Year on the Yorkshire Steam Railway
programme.desc: A look at the North Yorkshire Moors Railway, following the lives of some of the workers who keep the wheels turning and the passengers happy on one of the worlds most popular steam lines. To pull in the punters in, star engine Royal Scot is hired to headline for a week and for general manager Chris its an expensive gamble as this big and powerful engine was designed to thunder on mainline rails, while the heritage railway has much smaller platforms and bridges. Until Royal Scot arrives and goes through a gauging run on the line, they wont know if she will actually fit the railway

programme.title: The Royle Family
programme.desc: Denise and Dave bring baby David to visit, but Denise refuses to change his nappy and Dave reveals hes going to build a toy farmyard

programme.title: The Royle Family
programme.desc: Denise and Dave share the happy news that they are expecting their first baby. Denise has even given up smoking, while Nana says to phone back after Coronation Street. Jim is not short of advice on his hands-off approach to childcare, Barbara is in a panic about having to learn to knit and celebrations are already being planned down their local pub

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Gary staggers home from a residential creative writing course to find girlfriend Dorothy in bed with best mate Tony. Martin Clunes, Neil Morrissey, Caroline Quentin and Leslie Ash star

programme.title: Dont Wait Up

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Blanco ends up in the prison hospital, where he fears he is about to shuffle off this mortal coil and entrusts the whereabouts of his stashed fortune to fellow inmate Fletch, who is sharing a ward with him. Comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and David Jason. Originally broadcast in 1975

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.desc: A visit to a local country mansion reveals Boycies admiration for the long-established tradition of respect for the gentry. Elgin moves into Bryans caravan after being thrown out by his wife, leading to relentless gossiping by Mrs Cakeworthy. When the mobile home burns down Marlene offers the two men a place to stay, much to her husbands chagrin. John Challis and Sue Holderness star

programme.title: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: Old Mr Grace recognises a photo of Mr Humphries mother and begins to suspect the head of menswear may be his son and heir. John Inman stars

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: It All Began with an Old Volvo Headlamp
programme.desc: Clegg, Truly and Billy offer words of wisdom to a broken-hearted man they find seeking solace in the woods. Peter Sallis and Hywel Bennett star

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: The Lair of the Cat Creature
programme.desc: A hang-gliding enthusiast crashes down in the village, mistakenly believing that hes landed in France, thus breaking the long-distance record. The gang tries to compensate for his disappointment by making him the best at something else - identifying a strange cat creature lurking in the woods. Peter Sallis, Frank Thornton and Brian Murphy star

programme.title: Dads Army
programme.sub-title: The Desperate Drive of Corporal Jones
programme.desc: Captain Mainwaring camps the platoon in a deserted barn, unaware it is inside the target range of an artillery exercise. Only Corporal Jones knows the danger, leading to a desperate race to raise the alarm in time. Clive Dunn, Arthur Lowe and John Le Mesurier star in an episode first shown in November 1972

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: Hyacinth invites the new vicar round for tea - but despite her meticulous planning, the afternoon does not go as planned. Comedy about a super-snob intent on climbing the social ladder, starring Patricia Routledge, Clive Swift and Jeremy Gittins

programme.title: Hi-de-Hi!
programme.desc: The staff try to stop Ted celebrating his birthday every two weeks in a bid to con gifts and free drinks out of gullible holiday-makers. programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: A Pick-Up of the Later Ming Dynasty
programme.desc: After helping Entwistle repair his truck, Truly, Clegg and Billy find their mechanical skills are put to the test once more when they help Tom and Smiler locate the source of an irritating squeak on their handcart. programme.desc: Nana arrives for her Sunday visit, so Jim and the family try to drag themselves away from the TV long enough to eat a hearty lunch - but the lads are late back from the pub and the roast potatoes are as hard as bullets

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly

programme.title: Dads Army
programme.sub-title: The King Was in His Counting House
programme.desc: Mainwaring orders his blundering platoon to guard the banks money until repairs on the bomb-damaged vault can be carried out - a move that naturally leads to chaos. Comedy first aired in 1972, starring Arthur Lowe, John Le Mesurier and Clive Dunn

programme.title: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: Miss Brahms becomes the store spokesperson when Grace Brothers tries out closed-circuit advertising. Comedy, with Wendy Richard, Mollie Sugden and John Inman

programme.title: The Royle Family
programme.desc: Baby David Keanu Ronan Best has just been christened, and now its time to wet the babys head with a few drinks, with family and friends invited back to celebrate

programme.title: The Royle Family
programme.desc: Nana arrives for her Sunday visit, so Jim and the family try to drag themselves away from the TV long enough to eat a hearty lunch - but the lads are late back from the pub and the roast potatoes are as hard as bullets

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Gary realises it is high time he got rid of his moth-eaten, flea-ridden, beer-soaked sofa of 25 years - leading to a trip down memory lane reliving his youth, his first day at work and his meeting with Dorothy. Tony makes an unwise purchase when he buys a snake from a man in the pub

programme.title: Harry Enfields Television Programme
programme.desc: Harry Enfields established comedy favourites, including forgetful pub landlord Les Norris, DJ dinosaurs Smashie n Nicey and Wayne and Waynetta Slob, drowning in pizza boxes

programme.desc: Baby David Keanu Ronan Best has just been christened, and now its time to wet the babys head with a few drinks, with family and friends invited back to celebrate

programme.title: Hi-de-Hi!
programme.desc: Resident Punch and Judy man Mr Partridge cons good-natured Jeffrey into funding one of his infamous drunken binges. Holiday camp capers, starring Simon Cadell, Leslie Dwyer, Paul Shane and Ruth Madoc

programme.title: Harry Enfields Television Programme
programme.desc: Harry Enfields established comedy favourites, including forgetful pub landlord Les Norris, DJ dinosaurs Smashie n Nicey and Wayne and Waynetta Slob, drowning in pizza boxes

programme.title: Dont Wait Up
programme.desc: Tom is having a difficult time following his break-up with Madeline, while Toby is facing problems of his own

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Dont Wait Up
programme.desc: Tom meets a Swedish girl at a wine bar, while Toby finds himself entangled with the police

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: The documentary follows two couples on a busy maternity ward in Leeds. Father-to-be William, who met his wife Belem online, shoots a video with a running commentary in Spanish for his family in Colombia, while Kerry has set aside 84 colour co-ordinated outfits for their new addition, explaining that if she isnt fully prepared for something she panics. However, when her babys heart rate drops in labour, its her partner Dan who starts to worry

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Gambling in Las Vegas
programme.desc: The presenter takes a trip to Nevada, staying in Sin Citys Hilton hotel - which played host to Elvis Presley for 800 consecutive shows and now regularly acts as a venue for packed-out concerts by Barry Manilow. Among the high-rollers he meets is an elderly woman who lost $4million over the course of 10 years. It is then time for him to experience a long night on the blackjack table and learn how to play baccarat

programme.title: Louis Theroux - A Place for Paedophiles
programme.desc: The broadcaster reports from Coalinga State Hospital in California, home to more than 500 sex offenders, many of whom have already served lengthy prison sentences and are deemed unsafe for release. During his visit, Louis finds out about a therapy programme run by psychologists who hope to rehabilitate willing participants - but many inmates refuse to take part, with only 13 having completed the course since it began

programme.title: Michael McIntyres The Wheel
programme.desc: A trio of contestants have their fingers crossed for a big win on The Wheel, with DJ Tony Blackburn, scientist Maggie Aderin-Pocock and choirmaster Gareth Malone guiding them on

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: MasterChef Australia
programme.desc: Internationally renowned trailblazer chef Clare Smyth from Oncore in Sydney tests the contestants with a beef and oyster dish

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Game show, hosted by Ben Shephard, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on a large arcade-style coin-pusher machine. The more counters they collect, the greater the prize fund, with the last one standing competing for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles hits the road to catch up with some of the inspirational people and communities the show has helped in its 20-year history. On his travels across the length and breadth of the country, Nick returns to some of the series biggest and most challenging builds, including Canada Street in Manchester, The Yard in Edinburgh, and DIY SOSs most logistically-difficult and longest build - the construction of the Grenfell Community Centre and Dale Youth Boxing club

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Comedian Rhod Gilbert dons his hard hat as guest presenter for this ambitious build in Brandesburton near Hull, East Yorkshire. The team are joined by local volunteers to transform an overgrown 2.5 acres into a purpose-built adventure campsite for the St Michaels Youth Project (St Mikes), which receives funding from Children in Need

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles meets Scunthorpe woman Caroline Blanchard, a single mum who has twice had to make the decision to turn off the life support for people she loves. She and her children live in the shadow of the garage, where seven-year-old Natasha banged her head in 2007, and the conservatory, where husband and father Paul had a heart attack four years later. The volunteers plan is to give them a new home for a new start, including demolishing the conservatory and garage where these two tragedies occurred

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Game show, hosted by Ben Shephard, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on a large arcade-style coin-pusher machine. The more counters they collect, the greater the prize fund, with the last one standing competing for a £10,000 jackpot
